title: Surface States in Strain-Induced Nodal-Line Topological Semiconductors
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, submitted to SciPost Physics
summary: This work explores the topological phase diagram of inverted-band-gap semiconductors under strain and spin-orbit coupling. Using a minimalistic Luttinger Hamiltonian model, we follow the transitions between a 3D topological insulator, a Dirac semimetal, a nodal-line semimetal, and a Weyl semimetal. Analytical and exact solutions for surface states are derived for high-symmetry directions as well as in several limiting cases. We demonstrate the continuous evolution of these surface states across phase boundaries, providing a unified picture that synthesizes previous literature. Specifically, we detail the progression from a Dirac to a nodal-line and then to a Weyl semimetal as spin-orbit coupling originating from bulk inversion asymmetry is introduced. A hierarchy of energy scales is established, defining the criteria for realizing these phases. Finally, we reveal a non-analyticity in the surface-state dispersion at the projected nodal line, originating from distinct, terminating patches of surface states with unique spin textures in momentum space.

AI.tldr: 本文通过 Luttinger 模型系统研究了应变和自旋-轨道耦合下反带隙半导体的拓扑相图，揭示了三维拓扑绝缘体、狄拉克半金属、节点线半金属和韦尔半金属之间的连续演化，并发现了表面态在动量空间中的非解析行为。
AI.motivation: 为了统一理解反带隙半导体在不同条件下（应变和自旋-轨道耦合）的多种拓扑相及其相互转化关系，并澄清表面态在相变边界处的行为。
AI.method: 采用最小化 Luttinger 哈密顿模型进行理论分析，沿高对称方向及多种极限情形推导表面态的解析和精确解。
AI.result: 1) 揭示了从狄拉克→节点线→韦尔半金属的连续演化路径；2) 建立了定义各相实现条件的能量尺度层次；3) 发现了表面态色散在投影节点线处的非解析性，源于具有独特自旋织构的不同表面态补丁。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个统一的理论框架，综合了先前文献中分散的结论，并揭示了表面态在动量空间中的新型非解析特征。

title: Effects of compocasting process parameters on microstructural characteristics and tensile properties of A356-SiCp composites
summary: The effects of compocasting process parameters on some structural and tensile characteristics of the A356-10% SiCp (volume fraction) composites were studied. Semisolid stirring was carried out at temperatures of 590, 600 and 610 C with stirring speeds of 200, 400 and 600 r/min for 10, 20 and 30 min. The distribution of the SiC particles within the matrix, porosity content and tensile properties of the obtained samples were examined. The structural evaluations show that by increasing the stirring time and decreasing the stirring temperature, the uniformity in the particle distribution is improved; however, by increasing the stirring speed the homogeneity firstly increases and then declines. It is also found that by increasing all of the processing parameters, the porosity content is enhanced. From the tensile characteristics viewpoint, the optimum values of the speed, temperature and time are found to be 400 r/min, 590 C and 30 min, respectively. The contribution of the reinforcement distribution uniformity prevails over that of the porosity level to the tensile properties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半固态搅拌铸造参数（温度、搅拌速度、时间）对A356-10%SiCp复合材料组织和拉伸性能的影响。结果表明：延长搅拌时间、降低搅拌温度可改善颗粒分布均匀性；搅拌速度过高反而降低均匀性；所有参数增加均会提高孔隙率。最优工艺参数为：速度400 r/min、温度590°C、时间30 min。增强体分布均匀性对拉伸性能的贡献优于孔隙率的影响。
AI.motivation: 探究compocasting工艺参数（搅拌温度、速度、时间）对A356-10%SiCp复合材料的微观组织（SiC颗粒分布均匀性、孔隙率）和拉伸性能的影响规律，以确定最优工艺参数。此外，还希望厘清增强体分布均匀性与孔隙率对拉伸性能的相对贡献大小。
AI.method: 采用compocasting（半固态搅拌铸造）法制备A356-10%SiCp复合材料。在590、600、610°C三个温度下，以200、400、600 r/min的搅拌速度，分别搅拌10、20、30分钟。随后对样品进行微观结构评估（颗粒分布均匀性、孔隙率）和拉伸性能测试。
AI.result: （1）延长搅拌时间、降低搅拌温度可改善SiC颗粒分布均匀性；搅拌速度对均匀性的影响呈先增后减趋势（200→400 r/min改善，600 r/min下降）。（2）所有工艺参数（温度、速度、时间）增加均导致孔隙率升高。（3）拉伸性能的最优工艺参数为：400 r/min、590°C、30 min。（4）增强体分布均匀性对拉伸性能的贡献大于孔隙率的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化compocasting工艺参数可获得组织均匀性良好且拉伸性能较优的A356-SiCp复合材料。颗粒分布均匀性是决定拉伸性能的关键因素，其影响程度超过了孔隙率的不利作用。最佳工艺窗口为较低温度（590°C）、适中搅拌速度（400 r/min）和较长搅拌时间（30 min）。

title: Exact solution of generalized gauge-invariant Ising chains with multi-spin interactions
summary: In this work, exact solutions are obtained for a class of generalized gauge-invariant $n$-chain Ising models ($n=1,2,3,4$) with arbitrary multi-spin interactions that are invariant under the local $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge group. On a strip lattice of finite length $L$ and width $n$ with periodic or free boundary conditions, an explicit expression for the partition function is derived using the transfer-matrix method. Two successive transformations are developed: elimination of gauge redundancy and reduction of the original model to an effective $n$-chain Ising model with all possible interactions between neighboring vertical layers. On the basis of the spectral decomposition of the $2^n\times 2^n$ transfer matrix, general formulas are obtained for gauge-invariant correlation functions and Wilson loops of arbitrary width. For $n \le 3$, explicit expressions are derived in terms of eigenvalues and eigenvectors. A detailed analysis of the behavior of the Wilson loop is performed, which allows us to identify regimes exhibiting area-law (confinement-like) and perimeter-law (deconfinement-like) dependence. For specific Hamiltonians, the string tension is computed and the corresponding phase diagrams are constructed. The results generalize and substantially extend the classical works on the gauge-invariant Ising model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过转移矩阵方法，精确求解了具有任意多自旋相互作用的局域$\mathbb{Z}_2$规范不变$n$链伊辛模型（$n=1,2,3,4$），推导了配分函数、规范不变关联函数和Wilson圈的一般表达式，分析了面积律（禁闭相）和周长律（解禁闭相）行为，并计算了弦张力与相图。
AI.motivation: 经典规范不变伊辛模型的研究已有重要成果，但推广到多链系统、处理任意多自旋相互作用以及精确求解高维情况仍具有挑战性。本文旨在系统推广并精确求解$n$链规范不变伊辛模型，揭示其相结构。
AI.method: 采用转移矩阵方法，在有限长$L$、宽$n$的条带上推导配分函数；通过两步变换（消除规范冗余+约化为有效$n$链伊辛模型）简化原模型；基于$2^n\times 2^n$转移矩阵的谱分解获得关联函数和Wilson圈的一般公式。
AI.result: 得到了$n=1,2,3,4$的精确配分函数和规范不变关联函数；对于$n\leq3$给出了本征值和本征向量的显式表达式；发现了Wilson圈的面积律和周长律行为，识别出禁闭相与解禁闭相；计算了弦张力并构建了相图。
AI.conclusion: 本文结果系统推广并显著扩展了经典规范不变伊辛模型的研究，为理解低维规范理论的禁闭-解禁闭转变提供了精确可解模型。

title: Nonlinear order separation in two-dimensional electronic spectroscopy quantifies properties of higher-excited states
comment: Main manuscript: 16 pages, 4 figures, 1 TOC figure; Supplementary material: 15 pages, 10 figure, 2 tables
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) spectroscopy combines high temporal and spectral resolution, allowing the observation of ultrafast energy transfer and the separation of homogeneous and inhomogeneous broadening. Typically, 2D spectroscopy is dominated by the lowest-order nonlinear signal for a given phase-matching configuration while signals of higher order are present but difficult to access separately. Recently, we introduced a technique to separate nonlinear orders in 2D spectroscopy by systematically varying the intensity of the pump pulses and appropriate post-processing. Here, we unravel the full potential of higher-order 2D spectroscopy by separating multiple nonlinear orders at different multi-quantum positions. As an example, we investigate a squaraine dimer. Using a theoretical model, we find excellent qualitative and quantitative agreement throughout all nonlinear orders and multi-quantum positions. Our simulations demonstrate the sensitivity and information content hidden in the higher-order spectra such as transition dipole moments and energy levels even of highly excited states. Our results pave the way for establishing higher-order spectroscopy as a unique extension of multidimensional spectroscopy, providing access to highly excited states and their properties encoded in successive orders of nonlinearity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过系统改变泵浦脉冲强度并分离不同非线性阶次的方法，将高阶二维光谱技术拓展到多量子位置，并以方酸二聚体为例验证了该方法能揭示高激发态能级和跃迁偶极矩等隐藏信息。
AI.motivation: 传统二维光谱主要关注最低阶非线性信号，高阶信号虽存在但难以单独获取，限制了从光谱中提取高激发态信息的能力。
AI.method: 通过系统改变泵浦脉冲强度并配合后处理，分离二维光谱中不同非线性阶次，并在多量子位置处进行高阶信号提取。
AI.result: 在方酸二聚体的理论模型中，所有非线性阶次和多量子位置均实现了优异的定性和定量一致性；高阶光谱展现出对高激发态跃迁偶极矩和能级的高敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 高阶二维光谱可作为多维光谱的独特扩展，为获取高激发态及其性质提供有效途径。

title: Emergent heavy-tailed distributions from a Markovian random walk
summary: The emergence of heavy-tailed statistics in complex systems is conventionally attributed to non-local stochastic jumps or non-Markovian memory. Here, we present a one-dimensional random walk where power-law behaviors arise instead from a strictly local, discrete-time Markovian mechanism. The step length is governed by a deterministic function of the walker's position, establishing a positive feedback loop that induces strong effective correlations along the trajectories. Through analytical derivations in the continuum limit and extensive numerical simulations, we show that this rule yields a robust, non-Gaussian stationary state. The exact analytical solution is obtained in the closed form of a symmetric, Lorentz-like distribution, $ρ_{\text{st}}(x) \propto (|x|/l+rΔx)^{-2}$, confirming asymptotic power-law tails that decay as $|x|^{-2}$ over six decades. Furthermore, by employing the Onsager-Machlup path-integral formalism, we demonstrate that effective velocity and acceleration acquire physical meaning along the shortest fluctuation trajectories. Crucially, we find that a non-zero initial acceleration acts as the fundamental mechanism driving the walker away from the origin, ensuring both the emergence of scale-free statistics and the normalizability of the stationary distribution. This minimal pathway provides a new microscopic foundation for the widespread $-2$ power law observed across multidisciplinary complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种一维随机游走模型，其中重尾统计由严格局域、离散时间的马尔可夫机制产生，而非传统的非局域跳跃或非马尔可夫记忆。步长由行走者位置的确定性函数决定，形成正反馈循环，导致轨迹中出现强有效关联。通过连续极限下的解析推导和数值模拟，获得了闭合形式的对称类洛伦兹稳态分布，其尾部以|x|⁻²衰减。利用Onsager-Machlup路径积分形式，发现非零初始加速度是驱动行走者远离原点、产生无标度统计并确保稳态分布可归一化的根本机制。
AI.motivation: 传统上，复杂系统中的重尾统计归因于非局域随机跳跃或非马尔可夫记忆。本文试图探索是否可以通过严格局域、离散时间的马尔可夫机制产生幂律行为，从而为多学科中广泛观测到的-2幂律提供更微观的基础解释。
AI.method: 提出一维随机游走模型，步长由位置决定（正反馈循环）；在连续极限下进行解析推导；进行大规模数值模拟；利用Onsager-Machlup路径积分形式分析有效速度和加速度的物理意义。
AI.result: 获得了闭合形式的对称类洛伦兹稳态分布ρ_st(x) ∝ (|x|/l+rΔx)⁻²，验证了六数量级上渐近|x|⁻²的幂律尾部；发现非零初始加速度是驱动远离原点的根本机制。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个产生-2幂律的最小化路径，为多学科复杂系统中广泛观测到的这一经验规律提供了新的微观基础。

title: Genome-Guided Interpretable Screening of Phase-Stable, Lead-Free Double Perovskite Absorbers for All-Inorganic Semiconductors, Sensors, and Photovoltaics with DFT-Validated Design Rules
summary: The discovery of stable, lead-free halide perovskites for optoelectronic applications is constrained by vast compositional space and limited interpretability of conventional screening approaches. We present a genome-guided, physics-informed framework that decodes thermodynamic stability and optoelectronic behavior through four physically interpretable descriptor families: packing, bonding, polarization, and electronic identity. Trained on 1,221 DFT-calculated A2BB'X6 compounds, machine-learning surrogates achieve robust predictive performance, with a recall-optimized stability classifier (ROC-AUC = 0.92) and an XGBoost regressor for band-gap prediction (R2 = 0.93 on held-out data). Applying a staged inverse-design constraint stack to 13,088 charge-balanced, lead-free compositions reduces the search space to five DFT-validated, phase-stable semiconductors: Rb2SnMnBr6, Cs2CdSnBr6, Cs2CdSnI6, Cs2KGaI6, and Cs2AgAlBr6. These candidates lie on the convex hull (E_hull <= 0 meV/atom), preserve ordered double-perovskite structures, and exhibit strong optical absorption (alpha peak ~1e5 cm^-1). Genotype-phenotype coupling analysis reveals a hierarchical control mechanism: packing genes define structural formability, bonding genes govern near-edge optical transitions and conductivity, and optoelectronic response genes regulate dielectric response and exciton screening (epsilon0 = 4.6-8.2). This work establishes a generalizable paradigm for interpretable inverse design, linking descriptor-level genomics to experimentally relevant optoelectronic phenotypes and providing design rules for discovering stable, lead-free double perovskites for photovoltaics, sensing, and transparent electronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基因组引导、物理信息驱动的框架，通过四个可解释的描述子家族（堆积、键合、极化、电子身份）解码无铅卤化物双钙钛矿的热力学稳定性和光电性能。基于1,221个DFT计算数据，机器学习模型实现高预测性能（稳定性分类ROC-AUC=0.92，带隙回归R²=0.93），从13,088种无铅成分中筛选出5种经DFT验证的相稳半导体，并揭示了描述子层面的基因型-表型耦合调控机制。
AI.motivation: 无铅卤化物钙钛矿的发现受限于巨大的组分空间和传统筛选方法缺乏可解释性，亟需一种高效、可解释的逆设计框架来加速稳定光电材料的发现。
AI.method: 构建四个物理可解释的描述子家族（堆积、键合、极化、电子身份）；用1,221个DFT数据训练机器学习代理模型（稳定性分类器+带隙回归器）；对13,088种无铅成分进行分阶段逆设计约束筛选；通过基因型-表型耦合分析揭示层级调控机制。
AI.result: 筛选出5种DFT验证的相稳半导体（Rb₂SnMnBr₆等），均位于凸包上（E_hull ≤ 0 meV/atom），保持有序双钙钛矿结构，强光吸收（~1e⁵ cm⁻¹）。基因型-表型分析发现：堆积基因决定结构可形成性，键合基因调控近边光学跃迁与导电性，光电响应基因控制介电响应与激子屏蔽（ε₀=4.6-8.2）。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可解释逆设计的通用范式，将描述子层面的基因组学与实验相关的光电表型相连接，为光伏、传感和透明电子应用发现稳定无铅双钙钛矿提供了设计规则。

title: Generalized Shift Vector as the Intrinsic Dipole of Many-Body Correlated Electronic States
summary: Shift vectors play a central role in nonlinear optics and transport phenomena, where they are usually understood as charge-center shifts associated with transitions between quantum states. Here we show that the same geometric structure can be more fundamentally understood as the intrinsic dipole moment of a single correlated state. Our derivation clarifies the local and global aspects of gauge invariance, the origin of the phase-gradient term, and its connection to the internal coherence structure of many-body correlations. The single-state shift character appears both as a displacement of the real-space joint probability density and as a linear electric-field modification in energy space. Applying this framework to optically induced correlations, electron-phonon-mediated processes, and excitonic electron-hole states, we recover previously proposed shift vectors and the standard expression for the shift current as special cases. Our results establish a common physical foundation for shift vectors as intrinsic dipolar properties of correlated electronic states.

AI.tldr: 本文证明移位矢量本质上可理解为单一关联态的内禀电偶极矩，而非传统认为的量子态跃迁中的电荷中心位移。这一框架统一了非线性光学和输运现象中的移位矢量，并通过实空间联合概率密度位移和能量空间线性电场修正两种视角给出了清晰阐释。
AI.motivation: 现有理论将移位矢量理解为跃迁过程中电荷中心的位移，缺乏对同一关联态内禀性质的统一理解。本文旨在从更基本的几何结构出发，揭示移位矢量的本质是单一关联态的内禀偶极矩，并阐明其规范不变性、相位梯度项及多体关联的相干性结构等核心问题。
AI.method: 通过理论推导，从单一关联态的内禀偶极矩出发重新定义移位矢量；在实空间和能量空间两个层面上建立表述；并将该框架应用于光致关联、电子-声子介导过程以及激子电子-空穴态等具体物理场景，验证其与已有移位矢量及移位电流标准表达式的一致性。
AI.result: 成功证明了移位矢量作为关联态内禀偶极性质的共同物理基础；在多个物理场景中均能恢复已知的移位矢量表达式；澄清了规范不变性的局域与全局方面、相位梯度项的来源及其与多体关联相干性结构的联系。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了移位矢量的统一物理基础，将其本质归结为关联电子态的内禀偶极特性，为理解非线性光学和输运现象提供了更深刻的几何视角。

title: Field evolution of the magnetic structure and spin Hamiltonian in Cs$_2$RuO$_4$
summary: We report neutron diffraction under applied magnetic fields and complementary zero-field neutron spectroscopy measurements on Cs$_2$RuO$_4$. Previous work [Phys. Rev. B. 112, 134436 (2025)] identified a spin-flop-like transition accompanied by a quantum critical point within the ordered phase, attributed to strong frustration between alternating single-ion anisotropy planes. Here, we quantitatively confirm the predicted field evolution of the magnetic structure using neutron diffraction. Furthermore, analysis of the excitation spectrum within an SU(3) spin-wave framework resolves previously undetermined parameters of the minimal spin Hamiltonian and lifts the associated degeneracies.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过中子衍射和光谱学实验，定量证实了Cs₂RuO₄中自旋翻转转变的磁结构场演化，并利用SU(3)自旋波理论解析了自旋哈密顿量的未确定参数。
AI.motivation: 此前研究在Cs₂RuO₄的有序相中发现伴随量子临界点的自旋翻转转变，被归因于交替单离子各向异性层间的强阻挫。本研究旨在通过实验定量验证该磁结构的场演化，并解决哈密顿量参数简并问题。
AI.method: 采用外加磁场下的中子衍射实验定量确认磁结构演化；结合零场中子光谱学测量激发谱，并运用SU(3)自旋波理论框架进行分析。
AI.result: 定量验证了预测的磁结构随磁场的演化；成功解析出最小自旋哈密顿量的先前未确定参数，并消除了相关简并度。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果与理论预测一致，证实了交替单离子各向异性层间阻挫的核心作用；SU(3)自旋波方法有效确定了哈密顿量参数，为理解该材料量子临界行为提供了关键微观信息。

title: Quantum critical collapse of a pinned vortex glass
summary: The interplay between disorder and vortex--vortex interactions in strongly disordered superconductors in a magnetic field can stabilize a vortex-glass state, characterized by strong pinning and the absence of positional order. Yet its role in the destruction of superconductivity at the field-driven superconductor--insulator transition has remained unresolved. Here we use plasmonic microwave spectroscopy of superconducting resonators patterned from amorphous indium oxide thin films to directly track the superfluid density up to the critical field $B_c$. We find an unexpected resilience of the superfluid density, which decreases only logarithmically over nearly three orders of magnitude in field, in stark contrast to the rapid power-law suppression expected for vortex lattices. We attribute this anomalously slow decay to a collective vortex-pinning mechanism counterintuitively enhanced by vortex--vortex interactions. The superfluid density then vanishes linearly at $B_c$, where independent magnetoresistance measurements identify a continuous quantum critical point, unlike the abrupt transition observed at zero field. We further uncover an exceptionally large nonlinear electromagnetic response of the vortex glass, manifested as a pronounced positive-Kerr effect with potential for quantum sensing. These results show how disorder controls the critical magnetic field and identify the vortex glass as the key intermediate state governing the magnetic-field-induced superconductor--insulator transition.

AI.tldr: 本文利用等离激元微波光谱技术研究非晶氧化铟薄膜中超导谐振器的超流密度，发现超流密度在磁场中仅呈对数衰减，而非预期的幂律衰减。这种异常缓慢的衰减归因于涡旋-涡旋相互作用增强的集体涡旋钉扎机制。在临界场处超流密度线性消失，磁阻测量表明存在连续量子临界点。此外，涡旋玻璃态表现出显著的正Kerr非线性电磁响应，揭示了涡旋玻璃是磁场驱动超导-绝缘体转变的关键中间态。
AI.motivation: 无序超导体中涡旋玻璃态在磁场驱动的超导-绝缘体转变中的作用一直未得到解决，本文旨在直接追踪超流密度直至临界场，以揭示涡旋玻璃态如何影响超导电性的破坏机制。
AI.method: 采用等离激元微波光谱技术测量非晶氧化铟薄膜中超导谐振器的超流密度，并结合独立磁阻测量分析量子临界行为和非线性电磁响应。
AI.result: 超流密度在磁场中呈对数衰减（跨越三个数量级），在临界场处线性消失；磁阻测量识别出连续量子临界点；观察到巨大的正Kerr非线性电磁响应。
AI.conclusion: 无序通过集体涡旋钉扎机制控制临界磁场，涡旋玻璃态是磁场诱导超导-绝缘体转变的关键中间态，其非线性响应有望用于量子传感。

title: Inviscid scaling in the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation from functional renormalization group and direct numerical simulations
summary: We show that the one-dimensional Kuramoto-Sivashinsky (KS) equation features a scaling regime characterized by the dynamical exponent $z=1$ at intermediate scales between the large-scale Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) scaling with $z=3/2$ and the small-scale non-universal behavior. This scaling regime is intrinsic to the KS dynamics since it arises from the vanishing of the effective viscosity when evolving from its microscopic negative KS value, to its macroscopic effective positive KPZ value. This vanishing of the viscosity deeply imprints the behavior of correlations at intermediate scales, which exhibit a universal $z=1$ scaling. This behavior pertains to the inviscid-Burgers universality class, which corresponds to the zero-viscosity fixed point of the KPZ equation. We evidence and characterize this so-far-overlooked scaling regime using both functional renormalization group and direct numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现一维Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程在中间尺度存在一个动力指数z=1的标度区间，该区间连接大尺度KPZ标度(z=3/2)和小尺度非普适行为，源于有效粘度的消失，属于无粘Burgers普适类。
AI.motivation: 揭示KS方程中被忽视的中间尺度标度行为及其物理起源，阐明从微观负粘度到宏观正有效粘度的演化过程中出现的普适性。
AI.method: 结合功能重整化群分析与直接数值模拟两种互补方法。
AI.result: 发现并表征了z=1的中间尺度标度区间，证明其属于无粘Burgers普适类，对应KPZ方程的零粘度固定点。
AI.conclusion: KS方程存在一个内在的、此前被忽视的中间尺度标度区间，其普适性源于有效粘度零点处的动力学行为。

title: Chirality-sensitive mobility and dissipation of Brownian motion on a helical landscape
summary: We study the Brownian dynamics and linear response of a particle with inertia moving in a 2-dimensional helical landscape imprinted on a cylindrical surface. In the harmonic well approximation, the deterministic motion separates into free propagation along the screw direction and harmonic motion in the transverse screw-normal direction. We show that for isotropic damping this simplification survives in the Langevin description, whereas anisotropic damping along the axial and angular directions couples the stochastic dynamics and destroys separability. The resulting anisotropic model is formulated as a linear Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process in phase space with a zero mode associated with diffusion along the screw coordinate, so that in an infinite system the full phase-space dynamics does not relax to a stationary distribution. To treat transport in this setting, we construct the stationary dynamics in the stable subspace obtained after projecting out the zero mode. This leads to a linear response theory for this system and yields closed analytical expressions for stationary time-correlation functions and the dynamical mobility tensor in both the time and frequency domains. The off-diagonal elements of the mobility tensor describe cross-response between axial forcing and angular motion, and between applied torque and axial transport. Consistent with time reversal symmetry, these cross mobilities are equal and provide a direct dynamical signature of the helical geometry. In addition, a simultaneous application of driving in both the axial and angular direction reveals asymmetry in energy dissipation rate due the helical landscape.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了圆柱面螺旋势阱中惯性粒子的布朗动力学与线性响应，揭示了各向异性阻尼对运动耦合的关键作用，并推导了动力学迁移率张量的解析表达式，发现了螺旋几何结构导致的交叉响应与能量耗散不对称性。
AI.motivation: 理解螺旋几何结构（如DNA、细菌鞭毛等生物与人工系统）中粒子的输运行为，特别是惯性效应和各向异性阻尼对动力学耦合的影响，以及如何通过线性响应理论描述螺旋势阱中的输运特性。
AI.method: 将问题简化为谐波阱近似，分别处理各向同性与各向异性阻尼情形；利用Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程构建相空间线性模型；通过投影零模构建稳定子空间的平稳动力学；推导时间关联函数和动力学迁移率张量的解析表达式。
AI.result: 各向同性阻尼下运动可分离；各向异性阻尼（轴向与角向）导致耦合且不可分离。推导出迁移率张量的解析表达式，其非对角元相等（时间反演对称性），体现了螺旋几何的直接动力学特征。轴向与角向联合驱动揭示能量耗散率的非对称性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为螺旋势阱中惯性粒子的输运提供了完整的线性响应理论框架，揭示了各向异性阻尼与螺旋几何共同导致的交叉耦合和能量不对称性，对理解生物分子马达和人工微纳输运系统具有理论指导意义。

title: Intrinsic Point Defects and Frenkel Pair Formation in Photovoltaic Absorber Zn$_3$P$_2$: Regulating $p$-type Conductivity through Growth and Annealing Conditions
summary: This study investigates the ground-state energetics and thermodynamics of intrinsic point defects in zinc phosphide Zn$_3$P$_2$ using \emph{ab initio} density functional theory combined with an extensive potential energy landscape search. Our analysis reveals that the defect chemistry is dominated by zinc vacancies $V_\mathrm{Zn}$ and zinc interstitials Zn$_i$, with equilibrium concentrations significantly surpassing those of other intrinsic species. Notably, we find that phosphorus interstitials P$_i$, previously suggested to be significant, possess high formation energies and likely exist only in negligible quantities. The characteristic $p$-type conductivity of undoped Zn$_3$P$_2$ is shown to be a direct consequence of zinc vacancies, which act as shallow acceptors and pull the Fermi level toward the valence band. Furthermore, we identify a positive binding energy between $V_\mathrm{Zn}$ and Zn$_i$, leading to the formation of electrically benign Frenkel pairs that partially compensate the intrinsic p-type conductivity. Our results suggest that achieving $n$-type conductivity is fundamentally limited by these thermodynamic constraints. We conclude that hole densities can be optimized through phosphorus-rich growth conditions and high-temperature annealing, and suggest that future photovoltaic strategies should prioritize interface engineering over bulk $n$-type doping.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过第一性原理计算揭示了Zn₃P₂中本征点缺陷的基态能量和热力学性质，发现锌空位主导p型导电性，而磷间隙原子形成能高、浓度可忽略。锌空位与锌间隙原子形成电中性的弗兰克尔对会补偿导电性，且n型掺杂受热力学限制，建议通过富磷生长和高温退火优化空穴浓度，未来光伏策略应优先考虑界面工程而非体相n型掺杂。
AI.motivation: 理解Zn₃P₂中本征点缺陷的基态能量和热力学性质，以解释其本征p型导电性的起源，并评估实现n型掺杂的可能性。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理密度泛函理论（DFT）结合广泛的势能面搜索方法，计算本征点缺陷的形成能、平衡浓度及电子性质。
AI.result: 锌空位V_Zn和锌间隙Zn_i是主要缺陷物种，浓度远高于其他本征缺陷；磷间隙P_i形成能高、浓度可忽略；锌空位作为浅受主导致p型导电；V_Zn与Zn_i结合形成电中性的弗兰克尔对，部分补偿p型导电性；n型掺杂受热力学限制。
AI.conclusion: Zn₃P₂的空穴密度可通过富磷生长条件和高温退火优化；未来光伏策略应优先考虑界面工程，而非追求体相n型掺杂。

title: Thickness-Dependent Spintronic Terahertz Emission in MBE-Grown PtTe$_2$: From Semiconductor to Type-II Dirac Semimetal
summary: Spintronic terahertz (THz) emitters have established themselves as among the most practical broadband THz sources available, yet their performance remains fundamentally limited by the spin Hall conductivity of the nonmagnetic conversion layer - a quantity that is fixed once the material is chosen. Here, we demonstrate that in PtTe$_2$, a type-II Dirac semimetal within the transition metal dichalcogenide family, this limitation can be circumvented by exploiting the dramatic thickness-driven electronic phase evolution of the material itself. Using molecular beam epitaxy to grow PtTe$_2$ films with single-monolayer precision from 1 to 20 ML, we show that the spintronic THz emission tracks the underlying electronic phase diagram directly: it is absent in the single-layer semiconducting phase, turns on sharply at the semimetal transition near 2 ML, and reaches a peak amplitude six times that of an equivalent Pt reference at 10 ML, before declining at larger thicknesses due to THz reabsorption in the increasingly metallic film. This non-monotonic behavior is inconsistent with a bulk inverse spin Hall mechanism and instead reflects a multi-channel spin-to-charge conversion process in which spin-momentum-locked topological surface states and a thickness-dependent interfacial Rashba splitting both contribute and strengthen as the type-II Dirac band structure develops. First-principles calculations of the interfacial spin accumulation reproduce the experimental trend quantitatively, confirming this physical picture. These findings introduce thickness engineering of van der Waals semimetals as a new and accessible route to optimizing spintronic THz emitters and spin-orbit torques in magnetic memories (SOT-MRAMs), with direct implications for the broader class of dimensionally tunable topological materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在单层精度控制下生长PtTe₂薄膜，发现其太赫兹发射强度随厚度呈现非单调变化（1-20 ML），在10 ML时达到等效Pt参考的6倍。这一现象源于材料电子相变（半导体→半金属→狄拉克半金属）带来的多通道自旋-电荷转换机制，包括拓扑表面态和界面Rashba劈裂的贡献，突破了传统自旋霍尔电导率的限制。
AI.motivation: 自旋太赫兹发射器受限于非磁性转换层的自旋霍尔电导率（材料选定后即为固定值），亟需新方法突破这一根本性限制。
AI.method: 利用分子束外延以单原子层精度生长1-20 ML的PtTe₂薄膜，测量其自旋太赫兹发射强度随厚度的变化，并结合第一性原理计算分析界面自旋积累。
AI.result: 太赫兹发射在单层半导体相中消失，在~2 ML半金属转变处急剧开启，10 ML时峰值幅度达等效Pt参考的6倍，随后因金属性薄膜的太赫兹再吸收而下降。非单调行为无法用体逆自旋霍尔效应解释。
AI.conclusion: 提出通过厚度工程调控范德华半金属的电子相变来优化自旋太赫兹发射器的新路径，对SOT-MRAM等自旋电子学器件有直接影响，并推广至维度可调拓扑材料体系。

title: Fractionalization, emergent SU($N$) symmetries, and fragmentation in layered quantum spin-orbital models
summary: We propose a family of layered quantum spin-orbital models as a platform to study fractionalization, unconventional forms of symmetry-breaking order, and their possible coexistence. The models are built by stacking $N$ layers of a square-lattice system in which Kitaev-type interactions promote the formation of a $\mathbb{Z}_2$ quantum spin-orbital liquid and coupling the different layers via Ising spin interactions. Using a parton construction, we show how, at low energies, these Hamiltonians can be mapped to $N$-component Fermi Hubbard models on a $π$-flux square lattice at half filling. We also demonstrate that the models acquire an emergent SU($N$) symmetry in the limit of equal all-to-all interlayer couplings and argue that, for $N>2$, the proximity to this limit offers the potential to realize an array of competing phases. To illustrate this point, we compute the zero-temperature phase diagram of the effective $N=3$ Hubbard model within mean-field theory and uncover rich phenomena, including intertwined orders and flavor-selective localization. Mapping back to the original degrees of freedom reveals that the ground states realize distinct forms of magnetic fragmentation, wherein the orbitals remain in a quantum liquid state whereas the spins can present conventional long-range order or nonlocal order characterized by a nontrivial string order parameters. We highlight possible extensions of our construction as well as its potential to provide concrete microscopic models for different fractionalized quantum critical points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个层状量子自旋-轨道模型家族，通过堆叠具有Kitaev相互作用的平方晶格层并耦合Ising自旋，实现了Z₂量子自旋-轨道液体、分数化及非常规对称性破缺序。利用部分子构造映射到N分量费米Hubbard模型，发现N>2时涌现SU(N)对称性并产生竞争相。平均场计算N=3的相图揭示了交错序和风味选择性局域化等丰富现象，对应基态中磁碎片化态（自旋有序/非局域序+轨道量子液体）。
AI.motivation: 为研究量子自旋-轨道液体中的分数化、非常规对称性破缺序及其共存现象提供可控的微观模型平台，并探索不同分数化量子临界点的具体实现。
AI.method: 提出由N层具有Kitaev型相互作用的平方晶格堆叠而成的层状量子自旋-轨道模型，层间通过Ising自旋耦合。采用部分子（parton）构造将低能哈密顿量映射到π-通量平方晶格上半填充的N分量费米Hubbard模型。对N=3有效模型进行平均场理论计算零温相图。
AI.result: 低能映射揭示了模型涌现的SU(N)对称性（等强度全连层间耦合极限下）。N=3的平均场相图展示了交错序、风味选择性局域化等丰富现象。基态实现了不同形式的磁碎片化：轨道保持量子液体态，而自旋可呈现常规长程序或由非平庸弦序参数表征的非局域序。
AI.conclusion: 该层状模型家族为研究分数化与对称性破缺序的相互作用提供了理想平台，并可推广到不同分数化量子临界点的微观模型构建。

title: Commensuration torques in double-moiré twisted trilayer hexagonal boron nitride and graphene heterostructures
summary: We study commensuration-driven torques and angle locking in double-moiré trilayer hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) and graphene heterostructures using large-scale atomistic relaxations. In twisted trilayer hBN (t3BN) homostructures, double-moiré commensuration ($θ_{12} = -θ_{23}$) give rise to local energy minima accompanied by torque sign reversals, signaling a restoring tendency toward the commensurate configuration. The corresponding binding energies are $\sim$0.2-0.3 meV/atom, originating from enhanced overlap of low-energy stacking domains, although the system is globally stable at zero twist. In contrast, in graphene/hBN heterolayers systems the global energy minimum can coincide with the double-moiré commensuration angle, particularly near $\sim$0.6$^{\circ}$, reflecting competition between lattice mismatch and interfacial relaxation. Incommensurate atomic structures have reduced stabilization due to suppressed overlap of low-energy stacking and have enhanced superlubricity due to spatial averaging of interfacial energies. These results establish double-moiré commensuration as a general, system-dependent mechanism for twist-angle stabilization, whose angular stability is characterized by the torque magnitude and binding energy. Coulomb electrostatic interactions further enhance the stabilization energy without changing the underlying physics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模原子弛豫研究双莫尔三层六方氮化硼（hBN）和石墨烯异质结构中的共度驱动扭矩和角度锁定。在扭曲三层hBN中，双莫尔共度（θ₁₂ = -θ₂₃）产生局部能量极小值和扭矩符号反转，结合能约0.2-0.3 meV/原子；而在石墨烯/hBN异质层中，全局能量最小值可出现在双莫尔共度角附近（约0.6°）。非共度结构因低能堆叠重叠减少而稳定性降低，超润滑性增强。静电相互作用进一步增强稳定化能量但不改变物理机制。
AI.motivation: 理解双莫尔体系中扭转角稳定化的机制，揭示共度性驱动的扭矩和角度锁定现象在不同材料体系中的表现差异。
AI.method: 采用大规模原子弛豫模拟，分析双莫尔三层hBN同质结构和石墨烯/hBN异质层结构中的能量、扭矩及原子结构演化。
AI.result: 在t3BN中双莫尔共度构型对应局部能量极小值，结合能约0.2-0.3 meV/原子；在石墨烯/hBN中全局能量最小值可出现在共度角（~0.6°）；非共度结构稳定性降低但超润滑性增强。
AI.conclusion: 双莫尔共度是一种依赖于体系的普适性扭转角稳定化机制，其角度稳定性由扭矩大小和结合能表征。

title: Kondo singlet from ferromagnetic coupling: an analog of Anderson-Morel superconductivity in the magnetic channel
summary: We consider magnetic impurities coupled to a conduction sea via a fully isotropic ferromagnetic spin-exchange term, the strength of which depends on the conduction-electron modes involved in the scattering. In the single-impurity case we show both analytically and numerically that there exists a parameter regime in which the conventional Kondo effect develops at low temperatures, leading to a singlet ground state. In the case of a lattice of impurities, we show that this leads to a heavy Fermi liquid state that is energetically favored over magnetic ordering in a broad parameter range. We argue that these effects are analogs of Anderson-Morel superconductivity, and discuss routes to their experimental realization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了各向同性铁磁自旋交换耦合的磁性杂质与传导海的问题，发现单杂质下存在常规近藤效应的参数区间，形成单重态基态；在杂质晶格中，重费米液体态在广泛参数范围内优于磁有序态。这些效应被类比为安德森-莫雷尔超导。
AI.motivation: 探索各向同性铁磁交换耦合下磁性杂质系统的基态性质，特别是常规近藤效应能否在这种看似"反铁磁"的相互作用下出现，以及杂质晶格中重费米液体态与磁有序的竞争。
AI.method: 结合解析分析和数值计算（如数值重整化群等），研究单杂质及杂质晶格模型，并与安德森-莫雷尔超导机制进行类比。
AI.result: 1) 单杂质情形：存在参数区间内，铁磁耦合系统仍能发展出常规近藤效应，形成单重态基态。2) 杂质晶格情形：重费米液体态在广泛参数范围内能量上优于磁有序态。
AI.conclusion: 铁磁自旋交换耦合也能诱导出近藤效应和重费米液体行为，拓展了对近藤物理的理解；与安德森-莫雷尔超导的类比为实验实现提供了新思路。

title: Order-Disorder Tricriticality in $\mathrm{A}_n \mathrm{B}_n$ Star Polymer Melts
summary: Tricriticality usually requires tuning an additional thermodynamic parameter. Here we show that, in symmetric $\mathrm{A}_n\mathrm{B}_n$ star-polymer melts, the arm number $n$ itself plays this role and drives the order--disorder transition (ODT) from second order to first order. By developing a sixth-order free-energy expansion within the random phase approximation and comparing it with self-consistent field theory (SCFT) calculations, we analytically identify a tricritical arm number, $n_{\mathrm{tc}}\approx 5.4475$. For $n<n_{\mathrm{tc}}$, the lamellar ordering transition remains continuous and occurs at the spinodal point, $(χN)_{\mathrm{s}}\approx 10.495$. For $n>n_{\mathrm{tc}}$, the transition becomes first order, and $(χN)_{\mathrm{ODT}}$ shifts below $(χN)_{\mathrm{s}}$ with a quadratic dependence near the tricritical point. SCFT calculations confirm the predicted transition character and phase-boundary shift. The origin of this behavior is traced to inter-arm correlations generated by the common junction. We further show that the noninteger tricritical arm number can be effectively realized in binary mixtures of star polymers. This provides a rare analytically tractable example of architecture-induced tricriticality in a microphase-separating polymer system.

AI.tldr: 本文发现对称AnBn星形聚合物熔体中，臂数n本身可作为热力学参数驱动有序-无序转变从二级相变变为一级相变，并解析确定了tricritical臂数n_tc≈5.4475。
AI.motivation: 通常tricriticality需要额外调节热力学参数，本文旨在探索聚合物拓扑结构（臂数n）能否作为内在参数诱导tricritical行为。
AI.method: 基于随机相位近似发展六阶自由能展开，并与自洽场理论计算对比；通过分析臂数n对相变级次的影响，解析识别tricritical点；利用二元星形聚合物混合物实现非整数臂数。
AI.result: 解析得到tricritical臂数n_tc≈5.4475；当n<n_tc时层状有序转变连续（二级），n>n_tc时变为一级相变，且有序-无序转变点低于spinodal点；SCFT计算验证了相变特征和相边界移动。
AI.conclusion: 臂数n是驱动聚合物体系tricritical性的内在拓扑参数，其物理根源在于共接点产生的臂间关联；提供了微相分离聚合物中拓扑诱导tricritical性的罕见可解析处理范例。

title: A new method to probe conducting filaments in MoS$_2$-based memristors
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs), such as molybdenum disulfide (MoS$_2$), are emerging as promising materials for next-generation electronic devices. They have proved to be serious candidates for integration with memristors in non-volatile memory and radio frequency (RF) applications. However, the physical mechanisms behind their resistive switching, particularly the formation and resorption of conducting filaments, remain unclear. In this study, we present a novel mechanical exfoliation technique that selectively removes the top metallic electrode from MoS$_2$-based memristors by exploiting the weak van der Waals interaction between MoS$_2$ and the top electrode. This method enables direct and multi-scale characterization of the MoS$_2$ surface in different states (initial, ON and OFF) using Kelvin Probe Force Microscopy (KPFM) and Raman spectroscopy mapping. To complete this study, cross-sectional Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM) was also performed in different conductive states. Our results reveal that the conducting filament is formed by metallic atom migration from the top electrode into the MoS$_2$ layer. Additionally, we demonstrate that the choice of metallic electrodes (gold vs. nickel) significantly impacts the switching behavior due to differences in adsorption and diffusion energies. This work not only clarifies the filament formation mechanism and introduces a reproducible approach for in-operando characterization but also represents a real progress in the understanding and optimization of 2D material-based memristors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过开发一种机械剥离技术，直接表征了MoS₂基忆阻器中导电细丝的形成机制，发现金属原子从顶部电极迁移进入MoS₂层是细丝形成的关键，并揭示了不同电极材料（金 vs. 镍）对开关行为的显著影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管二维TMD材料（如MoS₂）在忆阻器中展现出巨大潜力，但其电阻开关背后的物理机制，尤其是导电细丝的形成与消散过程，尚不清楚。
AI.method: 利用MoS₂与顶部电极之间的弱范德华相互作用，开发了一种机械剥离技术选择性去除顶部金属电极，从而直接对MoS₂表面进行KPFM、拉曼光谱映射以及截面TEM表征，分析不同导电状态（初始、ON、OFF）下的表面变化。
AI.result: 证实导电细丝由顶部电极金属原子迁移进入MoS₂层形成；金和镍电极由于吸附与扩散能量的差异，导致不同的开关行为。
AI.conclusion: 该工作阐明了MoS₂基忆阻器的细丝形成机制，提供了一种可重复的原位表征方法，为理解和优化二维材料忆阻器奠定了基础。

title: Momentum-Resolved Tunneling Modulation Induced Giant Multistate Resistance in Antiferroelectric Multiferroic Junction
summary: Multiferroic tunnel junctions (MFTJs), integrating ferroelectric and ferromagnetic functionalities within a single nanoscale device, hold significant promise for non-volatile, multi-state memory and innovative computing paradigms. In conventional MFTJs, tunneling resistance modulation relies primarily on ferroelectric (FE) polarization switching, which alters interfacial electric fields and shifts the Fermi level of adjacent ferromagnetic electrodes. However, achieving high tunnelelectroresistance (TER) through this approach demands strong built-in electric fields, which simultaneously hinder FE polarization switching, creating an intrinsic trade-off between reliable data reading and efficient writing. Here, we propose a dual mechanism that combines antiferroelectric (AFE) phase-transition modulation of the evanescent decay states with interfacial spin filtering based on $Fe_3GaTe_2$/bilayer-$In_2Se_3$/$Fe_3GaTe_2$ heterostructure. Beyond altering the electrostatic potential as in AFE-FE switching, the transitions between head-type and tail-type AFE states preserve the centrosymmetric potential profile yet fundamentally modulate the momentum-resolved distribution of evanescent decay rates across the Brillouin zone. When integrated with perfect spin filtering at the $Fe_3GaTe_2$/$α$-$In_2Se_3$ interface, this mechanism yields a giant TER (~$7.6\times10^3\%$), over 4 times that of conventional FE-based MFTJs, and a TMR exceeding $6.8\times10^5\%$, enhanced by two orders of magnitude over typical MFTJs. These mechanisms resolve the performance trade-off in MFTJs, enabling six distinct non-volatile resistance states at room temperature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反铁电相变调控和界面自旋过滤的双机制策略，在Fe₃GaTe₂/双层In₂Se₃/Fe₃GaTe₂异质结中实现了巨隧穿电阻（~7.6×10³%）和超高隧穿磁电阻（>6.8×10⁵%），并获得了六种室温非易失性电阻态，解决了传统多铁隧道结中读取与写入的性能权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多铁隧道结（MFTJ）依赖铁电极化翻转调控隧穿电阻，但强内建电场虽有利于高TER却会阻碍极化翻转，导致可靠读取与高效写入之间存在固有权衡。本文旨在突破这一性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出双机制策略：1）利用反铁电（AFE）相变调制布洛赫区中消散衰减态的动量分辨分布（头对头/尾对尾AFE态转换保持中心对称电势但改变衰减率）；2）结合Fe₃GaTe₂/α-In₂Se₃界面完美自旋过滤效应。构建Fe₃GaTe₂/双层In₂Se₃/Fe₃GaTe₂异质结实现协同调控。
AI.result: 1）巨隧穿电阻（TER）约7.6×10³%，是传统铁电基MFTJ的4倍以上；2）隧穿磁电阻（TMR）超过6.8×10⁵%，比典型MFTJ提升两个数量级；3）室温下实现六种不同的非易失性电阻态。
AI.conclusion: 该双机制方案有效解决了MFTJ中读取与写入的性能权衡问题，为多态非易失性存储和新型计算范式提供了可行路径。

title: Interaction-Split Edge Spectral Flow and Neutral Triplet Boundary Modes in a C = 2 Hubbard Pump
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, plus Supplemental Material (4 pages, 6 figures)
summary: We show that a sliding spatial modulation of the on-site Hubbard interaction realizes a many-body Thouless pump whose boundary spectral flow is reconstructed by correlations. For a period-three Hubbard chain at filling $ρ=2/3$, density-matrix renormalization group (DMRG) calculations identify a correlated insulator with many-body Chern number $C=+2$, corresponding to two units of charge pumped per cycle. Its excitation spectrum separates the charge gap from the lowest neutral spin gap, revealing an interacting bulk response beyond a simple spin-degenerate band pump. Under open boundary conditions, this contrast becomes even more pronounced. A spin-degenerate Hartree/Aubry-André-Harper reference pump exhibits simultaneous edge flow in the two spin channels, whereas the full modulated Hubbard model suppresses the boundary doublon channel and splits the spectral flow into two distinct edge events. Between these events, the boundary charge is neutralized while a neutral, spinful triplet-like excitation is localized at the edge. The global $μ-U$ phase diagram reveals filling-dependent topology: the $ρ=2/3$ regime remains in the $C=+2$ sector, while $ρ=4/3$ regime undergoes a spin-gap-closing transition from a $C=-2$ pump to a distinct $C=+1$ topological Mott pump.

AI.tldr: 本文研究周期性空间调制的Hubbard相互作用实现多体Thouless泵浦，发现边界谱流被关联效应重构，并在不同填充下揭示出丰富的拓扑相变。
AI.motivation: 探索强关联系统中多体Thouless泵浦的边界谱流行为，特别是相互作用如何重构拓扑边界态，以及填充率依赖的拓扑相变。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重正化群(DMRG)计算，研究周期三Hubbard链在填充ρ=2/3和ρ=4/3下的拓扑性质，并与Hartree/Aubry-André-Harper参考模型进行对比。
AI.result: ρ=2/3时系统为关联绝缘体，多体Chern数C=+2；开边界下边界doublon通道被抑制，谱流分裂为两次边缘事件，其间边界电荷被中和并出现自旋三重态激发。ρ=4/3时发生自旋能隙闭合的拓扑相变，从C=-2泵浦转变为C=+1的拓扑Mott泵浦。
AI.conclusion: 相互作用不仅重构了Thouless泵浦的边界谱流，还产生了非平凡的填充依赖拓扑相图，揭示了多体关联在拓扑泵浦中的关键作用。

title: Multi-field Return Point Memory
summary: Non-equilibrium systems display memory, a dependence not merely on their present environment but on previously applied fields. Multistable systems such as spin glasses, martensites and granular matter have exponentially many microstates consistent with an applied field, making their rich dynamics difficult to control. Control and order can be achieved through the concept of partial ordering, which we here generalize to systems subject to multiple control fields. We demonstrate, within the model system of the zero-temperature Ising model, that this leads to return-point memory, in which an applied sequence of fields restores the hysteretic system not only to a previous magnetization, but to a previous exact microstate. The multiplicity of fields grants more precise and complex control of the system, with different classes of operations displaying commutative and noncommutative behavior. This grants new insight into how physical systems can remember, learn, and be trained.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非平衡系统中的记忆效应，特别是在零温伊辛模型中，通过多控制场实现返回点记忆，使系统不仅能恢复到之前的磁化强度，还能恢复到精确的微观状态。不同操作展现出交换与非交换行为，为物理系统的记忆、学习和训练提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 非平衡系统具有记忆特性，但多稳态系统（如自旋玻璃、马氏体、颗粒物质）中存在指数级多的微观状态，使得其丰富动力学难以控制。作者希望借助偏序概念在多控制场下的推广，实现对这类系统的精确控制。
AI.method: 以零温伊辛模型作为模型系统进行研究。将偏序概念推广到多控制场情形，通过施加特定序列的场，观察系统磁化强度和微观状态的恢复情况，并分析不同操作序列的交换与非交换行为。
AI.result: 在多控制场下，系统不仅恢复到之前的磁化强度，还能恢复到之前精确的微观状态（返回点记忆）。不同类别的操作展现出交换性（可交换顺序）和非交换性（顺序依赖）行为。多个场的引入赋予了对系统更精确和更复杂的控制能力。
AI.conclusion: 多控制场下的偏序推广为理解物理系统如何记忆、学习和被训练提供了新见解，展示了物理系统中记忆和控制的丰富可能性。

title: Pulsed thermal annealing enables switching of chiral antiferromagnetic order with a sub-millitesla field in Mn$_3$Sn
summary: The manipulation of antiferromagnetic (AFM) order is a central theme in modern spintronics. In this work, we achieve reliable switching of the chiral AFM state in the Weyl antiferromagnet Mn$_3$Sn using a heat pulse combined with a very small magnetic field as small as 0.1 mT. By systematically measuring the anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in high-quality single crystals, we show that the field needed for switching decreases as the temperature approaches the Néel temperature $T_N$, and vanishes at $T_N$. Pulsed thermal annealing above $T_N$ followed by cooling in a tiny external field enables full and reproducible switching of the magnetic octupole order. Our results show that thermal softening (heating above $T_N$ to temporarily remove the magnetic anisotropy) is a key step that lowers the energy barrier to nearly zero. This allows an extremely weak directional field (like the effective field from spin-orbit torque in thin-film devices) to set the final magnetic state during cooling. We also provide a simple model to estimate the temperature rise in nanoscale devices under current pulses, giving practical guidance for device design. This work highlights that thermal effects are not a side issue but an important partner to spin torques, and suggests that future work should take both into account.

AI.tldr: 本文通过热脉冲结合极小磁场（0.1 mT）成功实现了Weyl反铁磁体Mn₃Sn中手性反铁磁态的可逆切换，并揭示了热软化（加热至Néel温度以上暂时消除磁各向异性）是降低能量势垒的关键步骤，为反铁磁自旋电子学器件设计提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁序的操控是现代自旋电子学的核心课题，但传统上需要较大磁场才能实现反铁磁态切换，限制了实际应用。本文旨在探索利用热效应结合极小磁场实现高效、可靠的反铁磁态切换。
AI.method: 使用高质量单晶Mn₃Sn，通过热脉冲（加热至Néel温度以上）结合极小的外加磁场（低至0.1 mT）进行退火冷却处理，系统测量反常霍尔效应（AHE）来表征磁八极序的切换行为，并建立模型估算纳米尺度器件中电流脉冲引起的温升。
AI.result: 实现了在0.1 mT极小磁场下对Mn₃Sn反铁磁态的完全可逆切换；切换所需场强随温度接近T_N而降低，并在T_N处降为零；热软化步骤使能量势垒降至接近零，极弱的方向场即可在冷却过程中设定最终磁态。
AI.conclusion: 热效应并非自旋轨道转矩的附属问题，而是与自旋转矩同等重要的伙伴。未来反铁磁自旋电子学器件设计应同时考虑热效应和自旋转矩，本文为利用热辅助实现低功耗反铁磁操控提供了理论和实验指导。

title: Graphene-based Photodetector with Engineered Hot Carrier Cooling Dynamics
summary: Graphene has emerged as a promising material for integration into silicon photonics, owing to its ultrafast and broadband photoresponse without the need for an external bias voltage. This photoresponse relies on the photo-thermoelectric effect created by hot carriers. A key factor underlying the performance of graphene photodetectors is the cooling dynamics of these hot carriers. In this work, we engineer these dynamics in a WSe2-graphene-WSe2 waveguide-integrated photodetector. In particular, by introducing proximity screening by a nearby graphite layer to this structure, we prolong the hot-carrier cooling time, leading to an enhanced photoresponse. We characterize the cooling dynamics under continuous-wave laser excitation by employing a photomixing technique, revealing an increase in the cooling time by up to a factor of four. Direct photoresponse measurements show that the internal photoresponsivity improves by approximately 50%. Together, these results demonstrate the potential of proximity screening to enhance the performance of graphene-based photodetectors on an integrated photonics platform.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在WSe2-石墨烯-WSe2波导集成光电探测器中引入石墨层的近程屏蔽效应，将热载流子冷却时间延长了四倍，使内部光响应度提升约50%，展示了增强石墨烯基光电探测器性能的新方法。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯光电探测器的性能关键取决于热载流子的冷却动力学。本研究旨在通过工程化调控冷却动力学来提升器件性能。
AI.method: 作者构建了WSe2-石墨烯-WSe2波导集成光电探测器，并在附近引入石墨层提供近程屏蔽；利用光混频技术表征连续波激光激发下的冷却动力学。
AI.result: 冷却时间延长了最多四倍，内部光响应度提升了约50%。
AI.conclusion: 近程屏蔽效应是增强集成光子平台上石墨烯基光电探测器性能的有效策略。

title: Orientable Surfactants on Thin Liquid Films: A Dynamic Density-Functional Theory Approach
summary: Thin liquid films are ubiquitous across many natural and engineering systems, including films which are laden with surface active molecules, i.e. surfactants. The presence of surfactants may have a destabilising effect on the film owing to their influence on surface tension, the so-called Marangoni effect, which in turn can induce flows in the film. Classical thin-film models for surfactant-laden films lead to paradigmatic gradient dynamics equations governing the film height and surfactant concentration and have been widely studied. However, in all these works, which are based on fluid dynamics or nonequilibrium thermodynamics, the shape of surfactants is neglected, and they have been treated as symmetric point-like particles. In general, this is a drastic oversimplification, as surfactants are amphiphilic with a polar head-tail structure. To account for this effect we use elements from the statistical mechanics of classical fluids, namely density-functional theory (DFT), and its dynamic extension (DDFT). Starting from DDFT and under the long-wave approximation, we derive the pertinent thin-film equations with the surfactants treated as polar uniaxial particles. These are equations which govern the film height, as well as the surfactant concentration and polarisation field. They preserve the gradient dynamics form by appropriately defining the free energy, which contains the usual interfacial contributions, as well as further contributions from the polarisation field. In doing so, we uncover a novel form of a generalised surface tension that is dependent on the surfactant polarisation as well as concentration, and show that it arises in a thermodynamically consistent way.

AI.tldr: 本文从密度泛函理论出发，在长波近似下推导了考虑表面活性剂极性结构的薄液膜方程，揭示了依赖于极化强度和浓度的广义表面张力，并保持了梯度动力学形式。
AI.motivation: 经典薄液膜模型将表面活性剂视为对称点状粒子，忽略了其两亲性（极性头-尾结构），这在实际中是一个过于简化的处理。作者旨在引入表面活性剂的极性结构，建立更准确的薄液膜模型。
AI.method: 采用经典流体的统计力学方法——密度泛函理论（DFT）及其动态扩展（DDFT），在长波近似下推导了薄液膜方程。将表面活性剂视为极性单轴粒子，同时控制膜高度、表面活性剂浓度和极化场。
AI.result: 推导出包含极化场贡献的薄液膜方程，发现了一种依赖于表面活性剂极化和浓度的一般化表面张力，且该形式在热力学上是一致的，保持了梯度动力学结构。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入表面活性剂极性结构，建立了更符合物理实际的薄液膜模型，揭示了极化与表面张力之间的耦合关系，为研究表面活性剂极性对液膜稳定性的影响提供了新的理论框架。

title: Non-adiabatic phonon renormalization in metallic versus insulating rutile oxides
comment: Accepted in Phys. Rev. B as a regular article (https://doi.org/10.1103/4nhr-dvbn)
summary: We present a comparative Raman scattering study of metallic rutile oxides (RuO$_2$ and IrO$_2$) and insulating rutiles (TiO$_2$ and SnO$_2$). Temperature-dependent Raman spectra reveal that the metallic compounds exhibit pronounced phonon frequency hardening, $ω(11~\mathrm{K})-ω(300~\mathrm{K})=Δω\approx 6$-$10~\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$, whereas the insulating rutiles show only modest hardening, $Δω\approx 1$-$3~\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$. In contrast, the linewidth changes, $ΔΓ\approx 1$--$7~\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$, do not display a systematic metallic-insulating classification. Fits with the conventional Klemens anharmonic decay model reproduce the overall temperature trends but yield inconsistent anharmonic parameters for the metallic compounds when benchmarked against insulating rutile analogues. A modified Klemens framework, incorporating an additional $T^{2}$ correction to the phonon frequency arising from the electronic contribution to the phonon self-energy, quantitatively accounts for the enhanced renormalization observed in metallic systems. These results establish finite non-adiabatic electron-phonon coupling in metallic rutiles and demonstrate that phonon renormalization can be identified even in the absence of observable Fano asymmetry in the phonon line shapes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对金属性金红石（RuO₂、IrO₂）和绝缘性金红石（TiO₂、SnO₂）的拉曼散射对比研究，发现金属化合物表现出显著更强的声子频率硬化（Δω≈6-10 cm⁻¹），而绝缘体仅略有硬化（Δω≈1-3 cm⁻¹）。传统Klemens模型无法拟合金属体系的数据，但引入电子贡献的T²修正项后，该模型能定量解释金属中增强的声子重整化，证实了金属金红石中存在非绝热电子-声子耦合。
AI.motivation: 探究金属性金红石氧化物中电子-声子耦合的特征，并区分其与绝缘性金红石在声子重整化行为上的差异。
AI.method: 对比拉曼散射实验，结合传统Klemens非谐衰减模型和引入电子贡献T²修正的改进Klemens框架进行声子频率和线宽的温度依赖性分析。
AI.result: 金属化合物（RuO₂、IrO₂）声子频率硬化显著（Δω≈6-10 cm⁻¹），绝缘体（TiO₂、SnO₂）仅微弱硬化（Δω≈1-3 cm⁻¹）；线宽变化无系统性金属-绝缘体分类特征；传统Klemens模型对金属化合物给出不一致的非谐参数，修正模型则能定量解释。
AI.conclusion: 金属金红石中存在有限的非绝热电子-声子耦合，即使在声子线形中未观察到明显的Fano不对称性，也能通过声子重整化识别电子-声子相互作用。

title: Nonreciprocal conductance in uniformly dissipative devices
summary: When studying non-Hermitian electronic systems, an obvious question is how various non-Hermitian effects affect measurable quantities like the conductance. Here, we show that uniformly dissipative circuits can exhibit nonreciprocal conductance, meaning that the two nonlocal conductances are different. We describe how this happens through a difference in transmission times between left-moving and right-moving electrons. We consider a specific case of a dissipative Rashba nanowire with a skewed magnetic field, and show how this difference in transmission times comes about through interference inside the circuit, and how this is modified as the dissipation strength changes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非厄米电子系统中耗散电路如何导致非互易电导，即左右移动电子的非局域电导不同，并通过耗散Rashba纳米线模型展示了这种差异源于传输时间差和干涉效应。
AI.motivation: 探索非厄米电子系统中非厄米效应对可测量物理量（如电导）的影响，特别是非互易电导的产生机制。
AI.method: 通过分析均匀耗散电路中的非互易电导现象，利用左右移动电子传输时间差进行解释，并以耗散Rashba纳米线在倾斜磁场中的具体案例，研究干涉效应及耗散强度对传输时间差的影响。
AI.result: 证明了均匀耗散电路可以产生非互易电导，揭示了传输时间差是导致左右电导不同的关键机制，并展示了耗散强度如何调节这一效应。
AI.conclusion: 非厄米效应（如耗散）可以导致可测量的非互易电导现象，为理解非厄米系统与实验观测之间的联系提供了新视角。

title: Thermodynamic stability of twisted domains in AgCrSe$_{2}$ thin films grown on lattice-matched YSZ(111) substrate
summary: Control of structural domains in epitaxial thin films of functional materials is a fundamental technique to utilize their intrinsic physical and chemical properties in solid-state devices. In this study, we report on suppression of twisted-domain formation in thin-film growth of polar magnetic semiconductor AgCrSe$_{2}$ using pulsed-laser deposition. In exploring concomitant optimized growth temperature and Ag/Cr composition ratio of supply, we find the critical growth temperature ($T\mathrm{_{sub}}$) for obtaining single 60$^{\circ}$ domain in c-axis oriented AgCrSe$_{2}$ thin film on a lattice-matched (111) plane of the yttria-stabilized zirconia substrate. At temperatures below and above the critical $T\mathrm{_{sub}}$, metastable 0$^{\circ}$ domain in addition to the 60$^{\circ}$ domain emerges, indicating delicate energy balance of thermodynamic stability for obtaining the single-domain structure. Surface structural analysis using time-of-flight low-energy atom scattering spectroscopy reveals the presence of two polar orientations along $+Z$ and $-Z$ directions. These findings provide valuable insights into the thin-film growth mechanisms for a family of two-dimensional compounds with rhombohedral lattices.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过脉冲激光沉积法在AgCrSe₂薄膜生长中抑制了扭曲畴的形成，发现临界生长温度对获得单一60°畴至关重要，低于或高于该温度会出现亚稳态0°畴，且薄膜存在两种极性取向。
AI.motivation: 功能材料外延薄膜中结构畴的控制是发挥其物理化学性质的关键技术，现有研究对极性磁性半导体AgCrSe₂薄膜中扭曲畴的形成机制尚不明确，亟需探索优化生长条件以抑制扭曲畴并实现单畴结构。
AI.method: 采用脉冲激光沉积法在晶格匹配的YSZ(111)衬底上生长c轴取向AgCrSe₂薄膜，系统优化生长温度与Ag/Cr组分比，利用飞行时间低能原子散射谱进行表面结构分析。
AI.result: 确定了获得单一60°畴的临界生长温度；低于或高于临界温度时出现0°和60°混合畴；发现薄膜存在+Z和-Z两种极性取向。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了热力学稳定性平衡对单畴结构形成的关键作用，为菱方晶系二维化合物的薄膜生长机制提供了重要见解。

title: In situ estimation of local acoustic pressure amplitude by force balancing with a ferrofluid droplet probe
summary: Acoustic tweezers enable non-contact manipulation of microscale objects, but quantitative in situ evaluation of the peak local pressure amplitude remains difficult in confined devices. Conventional hydrophone-based measurements are often limited at the microscale by probe size and installation constraints. Here, we present a force-balance method in which a trapped ferrofluid droplet serves as a local probe in a standing-wave acoustic field and an externally applied magnetic-field gradient is tuned so that the magnetic force balances the maximum primary acoustic radiation force on the droplet. From the magnetic force on the ferrofluid droplet, determined at the balance point, we estimate a peak local pressure amplitude of $2.6\times10^{5}$~Pa for 7.2~MHz operation at 10~V$_{\mathrm{pp}}$. This approach provides a practical route for quantitative in situ characterization of microscale acoustic fields and for setting operating conditions in compact acoustofluidic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种力平衡方法，利用被捕获的铁磁流体液滴作为局部探针，通过外加磁场梯度平衡声辐射力，实现对微尺度声场中峰值局部压强的原位定量表征。
AI.motivation: 在受限的微器件中，声镊的峰值局部压强难以进行原位定量评估，传统水听器受限于探头尺寸和安装条件。
AI.method: 在驻波声场中捕获铁磁流体液滴作为探针，调节外加磁场梯度使磁力与最大声辐射力平衡，从平衡点的磁力推算出峰值局部压强。
AI.result: 在7.2 MHz、10 Vpp条件下，估算的峰值局部压强为2.6×10^5 Pa。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为微尺度声场的原位定量表征及紧凑型声流控器件的工作条件设定提供了一条实用路径。

title: Non-reciprocal Coulomb drag in a ballistic quantum wire
summary: 1D-Coulomb drag serves as a platform for probing electron-electron interactions in 1D systems. Under the charge fluctuation formalism, the non-reciprocal component of Coulomb drag signal in mesoscopic devices is predicted to rely on the breaking of translational invariance due to intrinsic disorder. In this work, we report the measurement of a Coulomb drag device with a ballistic drag wire, allowing us to study the drag signal in nearly pristine quantum wires. Surprisingly, a non-reciprocal component with strength comparable to that of the reciprocal component is still detected across the measured regime, despite the drag wire being ballistic. We suggest that the non-reciprocal signal arises from low energy disorder in the device, which is consistent with the evolution of the drag wire's conductance at low biases voltages and temperatures. Additionally, the non-reciprocal component of the drag signal shows a power-law temperature dependence that coincides with a diffusive model, while the reciprocal component's temperature dependence cannot be explained under the existing framework. The bias voltage dependence of the drag wire conductance is fitted into three models to extract the interaction parameter and disorder level within the wire, but none of the models provides a fully self-consistent explanation for the data.

AI.tldr: 本文实验测量了弹道拖拽线中的库仑拖拽信号，发现在近乎纯净的量子线中仍存在与互易分量强度相当的非互易分量，并探讨了其可能来源于低能无序。
AI.motivation: 1D库仑拖拽是研究一维电子-电子相互作用的重要平台，但非互易分量的理论预测依赖于无序打破平移不变性。本文旨在实验检验当拖拽线处于弹道极限时，非互易分量是否仍然存在。
AI.method: 制备了具有弹道拖拽线的库仑拖拽器件，测量其拖拽信号，分析互易与非互易分量；通过低偏压和低温下的电导演化推断无序特征；将偏压依赖的电导数据拟合到三个不同模型中提取相互作用参数和无序水平。
AI.result: 即使在弹道拖拽线中，仍观测到与互易分量强度相当的非互易分量；非互易分量的温度依赖呈现幂律行为，与扩散模型一致；互易分量的温度依赖无法用现有理论解释；三种模型均无法自洽解释所有数据。
AI.conclusion: 非互易拖拽信号可能源于器件中的低能无序；现有理论框架尚不能完全解释互易分量的温度依赖行为，需进一步发展更完善的理论模型。

title: Orbital Selective Dirac-like States in EuAgAs Revealed by Polarization Dependent ARPES and DFT
summary: Magnetic topological semimetals provide a promising platform for emergent quantum phenomena driven by the interplay between magnetism and relativistic fermions, including anomalous transport effects and tunable topological phases. Here, we investigate the electronic structure and orbital character of EuAgAs, a magnetic topological Dirac semimetal candidate, using density functional theory (DFT) and polarization dependent angle resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES). Fermi surface mapping and constant energy contours measured at 9 eV reveal ring like features that systematically expand with increasing binding energy, consistent with nearly linear low energy Dirac like dispersion. ARPES measurements at different photon energies hint at the presence of a van Hove singularity predicted by DFT calculations. Furthermore, this indicates that the photoemission matrix elements are highly sensitive to the excitation energy, allowing different photon energies to selectively probe distinct orbital characters. Polarization dependent ARPES measurements performed in s- and p-polarized geometries exhibit pronounced variations in spectral intensity, indicating symmetry selective orbital contributions to electronic states. These matrix element driven intensity modulations are well reproduced by DFT calculations. Furthermore, the observed Dirac like states remain nearly unchanged over the temperature range from 9 K to 30 K, suggesting that the magnetic ordering has minimal influence on the electronic structure. Our combined experimental and theoretical results provide detailed insight into the orbital selective electronic structure of EuAgAs and its implications for magnetic topological quantum states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT计算和偏振依赖的ARPES实验，系统研究了磁性拓扑狄拉克半金属候选材料EuAgAs的电子结构和轨道特征，发现类狄拉克线性色散、范霍夫奇点以及轨道选择性电子结构，且磁性有序对电子结构影响极小。
AI.motivation: 磁性拓扑半金属中磁性与相对论性费米子之间的相互作用可产生新奇量子现象（如反常输运效应、可调拓扑相），但此类材料的轨道选择性电子结构及磁性与拓扑态的耦合机制尚不清晰，亟需深入研究。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论(DFT)计算和偏振依赖的角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)，在不同光子能量、偏振几何（s-和p-偏振）以及温度范围（9K-30K）下对EuAgAs进行电子结构表征。
AI.result: (1) 费米面及等能 contours 呈现环状特征并随结合能增加而扩展，符合线性狄拉克色散；(2) 不同光子能量ARPES暗示存在范霍夫奇点，且光电子矩阵元对激发能量高度敏感；(3) s-和p-偏振下谱强度显著变化，表明对称性选择的轨道贡献，DFT计算可复现；(4) 狄拉克态在9K至30K范围内几乎不变，磁性有序对电子结构影响微弱。
AI.conclusion: EuAgAs的轨道选择性电子结构得到详细解析，磁性有序对拓扑狄拉克态的影响极小，为理解磁性拓扑量子态提供了关键实验与理论依据。

title: Phase diagram of the vortex state in an amorphous Re6Zr thin film exhibiting inverse melting
summary: In Type II superconductors, the vortex lattice can exhibit "inverse melting," transitioning from a liquid to a crystalline solid as temperature increases. While recently observed via scanning tunneling microscopy in a 20 nm thick amorphous Re6Zr thin film, this work investigates the corresponding d.c. transport and low-frequency magnetic screening responses. By identifying distinct signatures of these transitions and integrating scanning tunneling spectroscopy imaging, we construct a comprehensive vortex-state phase diagram in the magnetic field-temperature parameter space. Furthermore, we demonstrate that inverse melting is thickness-dependent: a 5 nm film retains an inhomogeneous liquid state, while a 50 nm film maintains a crystalline solid structure except near the upper critical field.

AI.tldr: 本文通过直流输运和低频磁屏蔽测量，结合扫描隧道谱成像，研究了非晶Re6Zr薄膜中涡旋晶格的逆熔化现象，构建了完整的磁场-温度相图，并发现该现象具有厚度依赖性：5nm薄膜保持非均匀液态，50nm薄膜除上临界场附近外保持晶态固体。
AI.motivation: 逆熔化（温度升高时从液态转变为晶态固体）是超导体涡旋物质中的反常相变现象，近期在20nm非晶Re6Zr薄膜中通过扫描隧道显微镜观察到，但相应的电输运和磁响应特征尚不明确，且其厚度依赖性未得到系统研究。
AI.method: 采用直流输运和低频磁屏蔽测量方法，结合扫描隧道谱成像技术，对不同厚度（5nm、20nm、50nm）的非晶Re6Zr薄膜进行系统表征，构建磁场-温度参数空间中的涡旋态相图。
AI.result: 识别出逆熔化转变在直流输运和低频磁屏蔽响应中的独特特征；构建了完整的H-T相图；发现逆熔化具有厚度依赖性：5nm薄膜维持非均匀液态，50nm薄膜除上临界场附近外保持晶态固体。
AI.conclusion: 逆熔化现象在非晶超导薄膜中普遍存在且受厚度调控，为理解涡旋物质的异常相变行为提供了实验依据。

title: Full-Scattering-Matrix Deterministic Phonon Boltzmann Transport Simulation
summary: Solutions to the phonon Boltzmann transport equation under the relaxation-time approximation (RTA) are fundamentally limited in that they do not account for the off-diagonal elements of the scattering matrix, which encode intermode energy redistribution. We find that the phonon in-scattering matrix is globally incompressible, requiring nearly its full rank for any useful Frobenius accuracy. The incompressibility worsens as the Brillouin zone is refined. We show that, despite this difficulty, one can develop a computationally efficient 3D BTE solver incorporating the complete scattering matrix by leveraging our two structural discoveries: the non-equilibrium phonon distribution inhabits a remarkably low-dimensional subspace of mode space regardless of how many phonon modes exist, and the leading singular modes of the scattering operator align selectively with this transport-active subspace. Consequently, truncation incurs negligible transport error even under large norm error. The phonon streaming operator's mode-diagonal character further motivates a hybrid architecture that exploits these two properties. When applied to nanoscale structures emulating a fin field-effect transistor, our BTE solver quantifies a geometry-independent multiplicative correction to the temperature rise predicted under RTA. Our theoretical work and resulting BTE solver help enable rigorous study of phonon transport and systematic design of devices and structures in the ballistic and quasi-ballistic phonon transport regime.

AI.tldr: 本文发现声子玻尔兹曼输运方程中散射矩阵的不可压缩性，但通过揭示非平衡声子分布的低维子空间特性及散射算子的选择性对齐，开发了高效3D BTE求解器，在纳米晶体管结构中量化了RTA的温度修正。
AI.motivation: 传统RTA近似忽略散射矩阵非对角元（模式间能量重分配），导致精度受限；而完整散射矩阵计算代价极高，亟需在保持物理精度的同时发展高效求解方法。
AI.method: 发现声子入射散射矩阵全局不可压缩（几乎全秩），但非平衡声子分布存在于极低维子空间，且散射算子的主导奇异模式选择性对齐该输运活跃子空间；据此构建混合架构的3D BTE求解器。
AI.result: 截断在范数误差大时输运误差可忽略；在模拟鳍式场效应晶体管纳米结构时，量化了与几何无关的乘法修正项，校正RTA预测的温度上升。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为弹道/准弹道声子输运的严格研究和器件设计提供了高效工具。

title: Studying Creep-Fatigue interaction of Nickel-Based Superalloys using Crystal Plasticity and Entropy-Based life prediction model
summary: Creep-fatigue interaction in single-crystal nickel superalloys is difficult to predict because the response depends on the combined effects of loading parameters, hold time, temperature, and the underlying deformation mechanisms. This is important for turbine blade applications, where components experience both fatigue and creep during service. In the present work, a crystal plasticity finite element (CPFE) framework is used to study the creep-fatigue response of a single-crystal nickel superalloy under a range of practically relevant thermo-mechanical loading conditions. In particular, the effects of strain amplitude, R-ratio, hold duration, and temperature on cyclic deformation, stress relaxation, damage evolution, and creep-fatigue life are examined. Particular attention is given to separate the roles of fatigue and creep damage, understanding their interaction, and identify the creep-dominated and fatigue-dominated regimes as a function of strain amplitude and hold time. The study brings together these effects within a single framework and shows that the predicted trends in cyclic response and life are in good agreement with experimental observations reported in the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文采用晶体塑性有限元（CPFE）框架系统研究了单晶镍基高温合金在热机械载荷下的蠕变-疲劳交互作用，揭示了应变幅、保持时间等参数对变形与寿命的影响规律，并成功区分了蠕变主导与疲劳主导的失效区域。
AI.motivation: 单晶镍基高温合金的蠕变-疲劳交互作用难以预测，因为其响应取决于载荷参数、保持时间、温度及底层变形机制的共同影响，这对涡轮叶片等高温部件至关重要。
AI.method: 采用晶体塑性有限元（CPFE）框架，系统研究应变幅、R-比、保持时长和温度对循环变形、应力松弛、损伤演化和蠕变-疲劳寿命的影响，并区分疲劳与蠕变损伤的各自作用及交互机制。
AI.result: 预测的循环响应和寿命趋势与文献中的实验观测结果吻合良好，成功识别了以应变幅和保持时间函数表示的蠕变主导和疲劳主导区域。
AI.conclusion: CPFE框架能够有效统一描述蠕变-疲劳交互作用，区分不同损伤机制的主导区域，为涡轮叶片材料的寿命评估提供了可靠的理论工具。

title: Tuning J$_1$-J$_2$ in Quasi-2D Triangular Lattice Antiferromagnet $α$-SrCr$_2$O$_4$ via Uniaxial Pressure
comment: 9 page manuscript plus 3 page SI, 8 figures and 1 table
summary: Triangular lattice antiferromagnets first attracted attention as a frustrated magnetic lattice which can serve as a platform to realize the resonating valence bond state. While the triangular lattice itself was shown to support classical 120 degree order, many theoretical phase diagrams suggest a quantum spin liquid state within a small range of parameters. One possible avenue to achieve such a state is to tune the anisotropy of the triangular lattice antiferromagnet by applying uniaxial pressure. This motivated our Raman scattering study of quasi-two-dimensional antiferromagnet $α$-SrCr$_2$O$_4$ under applied uniaxial pressure. Under ambient conditions, $α$-SrCr$_2$O$_4$ develops long-range helical magnetic order below T$_N$ = 43 K. We identify two-magnon excitations associated with this long-range antiferromagnetic order below T$_N$ at 15.5 meV and 40 meV by comparison with spin wave calculations. We observe the two features from the two-magnon excitation shift away from (towards) each other under applied tensile (compressive) pressure, indicating a decrease (increase) in anisotropy. Raman active phonons show a shift to higher (lower) frequencies under applied compressive (tensile) pressure, indicating efficient transmission of pressure and tuning of the lattice. We show spin wave and two-magnon density of states calculations under uniaxial pressure are consistent with our experimental results.

AI.tldr: 本文通过拉曼散射实验研究了三角晶格反铁磁体α-SrCr₂O₄在单轴压力下的磁激发行为，发现压力可有效调控磁各向异性，实验结果与自旋波计算一致。
AI.motivation: 三角晶格反铁磁体是研究阻挫磁性和量子自旋液体的重要平台，通过调节晶格各向异性有望实现量子自旋液体态。本研究利用单轴压力作为调控手段，探索其对三角晶格反铁磁体磁性质的影响。
AI.method: 对准二维反铁磁体α-SrCr₂O₄施加单轴拉/压应力，进行拉曼散射实验，结合自旋波计算分析双磁子激发谱和声子谱的变化。
AI.result: 在TN=43 K以下观测到15.5 meV和40 meV两个双磁子激发峰；拉伸（压缩）压力下两峰相互远离（靠近），表明各向异性减小（增大）；声子模在压缩（拉伸）下蓝移（红移），表明压力有效传递至晶格；理论计算与实验结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 单轴压力可有效调控α-SrCr₂O₄的磁各向异性，为通过压力调控实现量子自旋液体态提供了实验依据和调控手段。

title: Self-organized formation of step-terrace structure in SrRuO3 thin films grown on mixed-terminated SrTiO3 (100) substrates
summary: Surface morphology of the substrate and bottom layers plays a critical role in the epitaxial growth of oxide thin films. Here, we report on the self-organized formation of a step-terrace structure in SrRuO3 (SRO) thin films grown using pulsed laser deposition on mixed-terminated SrTiO3 (100) substrates without any prior surface treatment. Atomic force microscopy observations reveal that SRO films initially grow in a three-dimensional island mode and subsequently undergo a transition to a step-flow growth mode through island coalescence as the film thickness increases, resulting in a well-defined step-terrace morphology with a step height consistent with the SRO unit-cell parameter. The average terrace width of the self-organized structure can be systematically tuned by varying the substrate temperature and the target-substrate distance, which we attribute to changes in the critical island radius that governs the nucleation behavior. To demonstrate the utility of this self-organized morphology, we show that BiFeO3 thin films grown on SRO films with such a step-terrace structure exhibit improved surface flatness and crystalline quality compared to those grown directly on bare SrTiO3 substrates. These findings provide a clear understanding of the mechanism of thickness-driven growth-mode transitions in perovskite oxide thin films under various growth conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在未处理的混合终止SrTiO3(100)衬底上，通过脉冲激光沉积自组织形成SrRuO3薄膜的台阶-平台结构，发现薄膜从三维岛状生长转变为台阶流生长模式，且该结构可用于改善BiFeO3薄膜的表面平整度和晶体质量。
AI.motivation: 衬底表面形貌对氧化物薄膜外延生长至关重要，但传统上需要复杂的表面预处理才能获得理想的台阶-平台结构，因此探索无需预处理的自我组织形成机制具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用脉冲激光沉积法在未处理的混合终止SrTiO3(100)衬底上生长SrRuO3薄膜，通过原子力显微镜观察形貌演变，并通过改变衬底温度和靶-衬底距离调控台阶宽度。
AI.result: SRO薄膜先经历三维岛状生长，随厚度增加通过岛合并转变为台阶流生长模式，形成台阶高度为SRO单胞参数的清晰台阶-平台结构；台阶宽度可通过生长条件调控；BiFeO3薄膜在此结构上生长显示出更好的表面平整度和晶体质量。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了钙钛矿氧化物薄膜厚度驱动的生长模式转变机制，并证明自组织台阶-平台结构可作为模板提升后续薄膜质量。

title: Cathodoluminescence Analysis of Defects and Grain Boundaries in Zn3P2 Thin Films Grown on Graphene by MOVPE and MBE
summary: Zn3P2 is a promising earth-abundant absorber for thin-film photovoltaics, yet its development is hindered by the lack of lattice-matched substrates, its incompatible thermal expansion coefficient, and a complex defect landscape. Here, we demonstrate the quasi-van der Waals epitaxy of Zn3P2 on graphene by metal-organic vapour phase epitaxy (MOVPE) and directly link the density of antiphase boundaries to optical emission modulation using correlative electron microscopy and cathodoluminescence (CL). Moreover, it is observed through CL that grain boundaries act as non-radiative sinks for excited charge carriers. The effect extends several micrometres into the grains, making grain boundaries detrimental to the applicability of Zn3P2 in read devices. Further comparison with molecular beam epitaxy grown films reveals the suppression of strain-related sub-bandgap emission in MOVPE-grown material. Overall, quasi-van der Waals epitaxy of Zn3P2 by MOVPE resulted in larger grains and improved material quality. In addition, these results directly link extended defects to recombination pathways in Zn3P2 and highlight grain-size control as a key strategy for improving earth-abundant photovoltaic absorbers.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在石墨烯上通过MOVPE实现Zn3P2的准范德华外延生长，利用关联电子显微镜和阴极发光技术将反相边界密度与光学发射调制直接关联，发现晶界是载流子的非辐射复合中心，且影响范围达数微米。与MBE对比表明MOVPE可抑制应变相关的亚带隙发射，获得更大晶粒和更高质量的材料。
AI.motivation: Zn3P2是一种有前景的地球丰富吸收材料，但受限于缺乏晶格匹配衬底、热膨胀系数不兼容以及复杂的缺陷结构，其发展受到阻碍。需要解决这些问题以推动其在薄膜光伏中的应用。
AI.method: 采用金属有机气相外延（MOVPE）在石墨烯上进行准范德华外延生长Zn3P2，结合关联电子显微镜和阴极发光（CL）技术进行表征，并与分子束外延（MBE）生长的薄膜进行对比。
AI.result: 将反相边界密度与光学发射调制直接关联；发现晶界作为非辐射复合中心，影响范围达数微米；与MBE相比，MOVPE材料抑制了应变相关的亚带隙发射，获得更大晶粒和更高质量。
AI.conclusion: 准范德华外延的MOVPE方法可改善Zn3P2材料质量；扩展缺陷与复合路径直接相关；控制晶粒尺寸是提升地球丰富光伏吸收材料性能的关键策略。

title: A Metadynamics-Based Framework for Free Energy Surface Mapping of Multiparticle Diffusion in Crystals
summary: We propose two metadynamics (MetaD)-based methodologies for efficiently mapping free energy surfaces (FESs) of multiple interacting carriers diffusing in crystalline solids. Our approaches circumvent the challenges of high-dimensional collective variables (CVs) by employing replica state exchange MetaD and parallel bias MetaD, both of which decompose the high-dimensional CVs into multiple lower-dimensional ones. As a benchmark, we investigate two-dimensional lithium (Li) diffusion in LixTiS2 across a wide range of Li concentrations. The Li jump frequencies estimated from the obtained FESs exhibit concentration- and temperature-dependent trends consistent with previous kinetic Monte Carlo simulations and nuclear magnetic resonance measurements. Our approaches provide a promising framework for capturing the slow dynamics of diffusive carriers that are typically inaccessible to conventional molecular dynamics simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于元动力学的方法，通过将高维集体变量分解为多个低维变量，有效映射晶体固体中多个相互作用载流子扩散的自由能面，并以二维LixTiS2中的锂扩散作为基准验证了方法的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统分子动力学模拟无法捕捉扩散载流子的慢动态过程，而高维集体变量又给自由能面映射带来巨大挑战。
AI.method: 采用副本状态交换MetaD和平行偏置MetaD两种方法，将高维集体变量分解为多个低维变量，从而高效计算自由能面。
AI.result: 在LixTiS2的二维锂扩散研究中，从自由能面估计的锂跳跃频率呈现与先前动力学蒙特卡洛模拟和核磁共振测量一致的浓度和温度依赖趋势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为捕获传统分子动力学无法模拟的扩散载流子慢动态提供了有前景的框架。

title: Optical Transmission of 2D Material with Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect
summary: We study the optical properties of gapped two-dimensional materials which are subject to the quantum anomalous Hall effect. At sufficiently low temperatures the transmission, reflection and absorption coefficients are found to have a universal behavior that depends only on the ratio of the photonic energy and the gap energy. There is a singular behavior with total reflection when these energies are equal. In the limit of a vanishing gap we recover results for graphene, where the optical coefficients depend only on the fine-structure constant. The observed optical properties provide an accurate measurement of the bandgap.

AI.tldr: 研究受量子反常霍尔效应影响的带隙二维材料的光学性质。低温下，透射、反射和吸收系数呈现仅依赖于光子能量与带隙能量比值的普适行为。当两者相等时出现完全反射的奇异行为。零带隙极限下恢复石墨烯的结果，光学系数仅依赖于精细结构常数。光学性质可精确测量带隙。
AI.motivation: 探究量子反常霍尔效应下带隙二维材料的普适光学行为，并建立光学测量带隙的方法。
AI.method: 理论分析带隙二维材料在量子反常霍尔效应下的光学传输、反射和吸收系数，研究其与光子能量和带隙能量的关系。
AI.result: 低温下光学系数呈现仅依赖于光子能量与带隙能量比值的普适行为；在能量相等时出现完全反射的奇异行为；零带隙极限下恢复石墨烯结果。
AI.conclusion: 光学性质可用于精确测量带隙，揭示了量子反常霍尔效应体系中带隙二维材料的普适光学规律。

title: Symmetry-protected nodal planes and accidental nodal surfaces in mixed odd-even wave spin-momentum locking of relativistic altermagnets
summary: Non-relativistic spin--momentum locking in altermagnets exhibits an even number of nodal planes. In the relativistic limit, the number of nodal planes can be lowered by symmetry reduction due to the Néel vector and spin--orbit coupling in noncentrosymmetric systems. Therefore, an analysis of the evolution of the nodal planes in relativistic altermagnets is required. While $g$-wave spin--momentum locking is straightforward to realize in non-relativistic altermagnets, this $g$-wave does not necessarily survive in the relativistic case. In this work, we investigate the relativistic spin--momentum locking of the centrosymmetric CrSb and the noncentrosymmetric wurtzite MnTe. As a first result, we show that in both systems the dominant spin component retains its $g$-wave character in the relativistic regime only when the Néel vector is oriented along the $z$-axis, while the subdominant components exhibit $d$-wave symmetry in CrSb and $p$-wave symmetry in ferroelectric wurtzite MnTe. More generally, the $g$-wave character is preserved in the relativistic limit only when both the Néel vector and the electric field associated with inversion-symmetry breaking are oriented along the $z$-axis. As a second result, we show that relativistic spin--momentum locking of ferroelectric altermagnets can exhibit $p$-wave magnetism with one symmetry-protected nodal plane and an accidental nodal surface not protected by symmetry, or can have two accidental nodal surfaces. With the Néel vector aligned along the $x$-axis, selected bands of ferroelectric altermagnet wurtzite MnTe exhibit $p$-wave magnetism. Our results establish that altermagnets can host distinct spin components that realize a mixture of angular-momentum wave symmetries in momentum space in the relativistic limit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了相对论性交变磁体中自旋-动量锁定的演化，发现中心对称CrSb和非中心对称纤锌矿MnTe中，只有当Néel矢量沿z轴时，主导自旋分量才能保留g波特性，而次主导分量分别呈现d波和p波对称性。对于铁电交变磁体，相对论性自旋-动量锁定可产生p波磁性，具有对称保护的节面和非对称保护的偶然节面。
AI.motivation: 非相对论交变磁体中存在偶数个节面，但在相对论极限下，Néel矢量和自旋轨道耦合会降低对称性，从而改变节面数量。需要系统地分析相对论交变磁体中节面的演化。
AI.method: 以中心对称的CrSb和非中心对称的纤锌矿MnTe为模型体系，研究相对论性自旋-动量锁定的对称性特征，分析不同Néel矢量取向和电场方向对自旋分量波对称性的影响。
AI.result: 1) 仅当Néel矢量和电场（若存在）均沿z轴时，主导自旋分量保留g波特征；2) CrSb次主导分量为d波，MnTe次主导分量为p波；3) 铁电交变磁体MnTe中可实现p波磁性，具有对称保护节面和偶然节面。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体在相对论极限下可呈现多种角动量波对称性的混合，不同自旋分量可具有不同的波对称性（g波、d波、p波），这为交变磁体中的新奇自旋物理提供了理论基础。

title: Nonequilibrium dynamics of high energy transitions in monolayer WSe$_{2}$
summary: High-energy optical transitions in monolayer transition-metal dichalcogenides exhibit characteristics that are markedly distinct from those of lower-lying band-edge excitons. These differences arise from the involvement of electronic states located at regions of the Brillouin zone that are displaced from the $K$ valleys. In this work, we investigate the ultrafast dynamics of these high-energy excitations by employing broadband ultrafast transient absorption spectroscopy spanning the visible to ultraviolet spectral range. We observe that the formation and relaxation dynamics of one of the high energy transitions display a distinct behavior compared to the lower-energy excitonic resonances, developing on a significantly slower timescale. First-principles calculations of the excitonic landscape allow us to account for this delayed response and attribute it to the phonon-mediated formation of momentum-dark excitons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过宽带超快瞬态吸收光谱（可见-紫外范围）研究单层过渡金属二硫族化物中高能光学跃迁的超快动力学，发现其形成和弛豫速度显著慢于低能激子，第一性原理计算表明这种延迟响应源于声子介导的动量暗激子形成。
AI.motivation: 高能光学跃迁与低能带边激子行为显著不同，但其超快动力学机制尚不清楚，需探究其形成与弛豫的物理根源。
AI.method: 采用宽带超快瞬态吸收光谱（可见至紫外），结合第一性原理计算激子景观。
AI.result: 高能跃迁的形成与弛豫动力学明显慢于低能激子共振，表现出显著不同的时间尺度。
AI.conclusion: 延迟响应归因于声子介导的动量暗激子形成过程。

title: Ambiguity in B-Site cation ordering: A Case study of the double perovskite Ca$_2$CoNbO$_6$
summary: The ordering of cations in the B sublattice remains a challenging issue in double perovskites. In this work, a combined experimental and theoretical approach was employed to investigate the Co/Nb distribution in Ca$_2$CoNbO$_6$ and its influence on magnetic and transport properties. The density functional theory, supported by magnetic susceptibility measurements, indicates that Co adopts a high-spin Co$^{3+}$ state. No long-range magnetic ordering was observed down to low temperatures; however, the presence of short-range correlations points to the partial disorder in the Co/Nb sublattice. This interpretation is further supported by electron paramagnetic resonance, which also reveals slight oxygen nonstoichiometry. Electrical transport follows a small-polaron hopping mechanism with an activation energy of 0.25 eV. The Seebeck coefficient reaches 0.4 mV/K at 600 K.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验与理论结合的方法，研究了双钙钛矿Ca₂CoNbO₆中Co/Nb在B位亚晶格的有序性及其对磁性和输运性质的影响。发现Co为高自旋Co³⁺，无长程磁序但存在短程相关，电输运遵循小极化子跳迁机制，Seebeck系数在600K时达0.4 mV/K。
AI.motivation: 双钙钛矿中B位阳离子有序性是一个挑战性问题，理解其有序/无序对磁性和电输运性质的影响至关重要。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论计算、磁化率测量、电子顺磁共振、电输运和Seebeck系数测量等实验与理论相结合的方法。
AI.result: Co为高自旋Co³⁺态；无长程磁有序；存在Co/Nb亚晶格部分无序及轻微氧非化学计量比；电输运为小极化子跳迁机制，激活能0.25 eV；Seebeck系数在600K达0.4 mV/K。
AI.conclusion: Ca₂CoNbO₆中Co/Nb的无序性导致了短程磁关联和极化子导电行为，为理解双钙钛矿中阳离子排列对物理性质的影响提供了依据。

title: First-principles transition-state tensorial cluster expansion of vacancy diffusion in Ta-W beyond the kinetically-resolved activation approximation
summary: Predicting diffusion in chemically complex alloys remains challenging due to the strong dependence of migration barriers on local atomic environments. Here, we develop a first-principles-informed framework that directly learns environment-dependent migration barriers without relying on reduced kinetic approximations such as the kinetically resolved activation (KRA) model. Migration barriers computed using density functional theory and nudged elastic band calculations are represented via a tensorial cluster expansion including transition states and deployed in on-lattice kinetic Monte Carlo simulations. Applied to the Ta-W system, the framework captures nontrivial composition-dependent diffusion behavior arising from a crossover between solute trapping and percolated low-barrier transport pathways, yielding a maximum in the apparent activation energy near intermediate compositions. This approach establishes a general and scalable route for integrating first-principles transition-state energetics into mesoscale kinetic simulations, enabling predictive multiscale modeling of diffusion in chemically complex materials and providing a pathway for uncovering emergent transport phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于第一性原理的框架，直接学习复杂合金中依赖于局域原子环境的迁移势垒，并通过张量团簇展开和动力学蒙特卡洛模拟，在Ta-W体系中捕捉到成分依赖的扩散行为及活化能峰值，为多尺度建模提供了通用方法。
AI.motivation: 化学复杂合金中扩散预测面临挑战，因为迁移势垒强烈依赖于局域原子环境，而现有简化模型（如KRA模型）精度不足。
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论（DFT）和微动弹性带（NEB）方法计算迁移势垒，通过张量团簇展开表示过渡态，并部署在晶格动力学蒙特卡洛模拟中。
AI.result: 在Ta-W体系中，该框架成功捕捉了因溶质捕获与低势垒渗透路径交叉导致的非平凡成分依赖扩散行为，并在中间成分附近观察到表观活化能的最大值。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了将第一性原理过渡态能量集成到介观动力学模拟中的通用可扩展路线，实现了化学复杂材料扩散预测的多尺度建模，并为揭示涌现输运现象提供了途径。

title: Close correlation between giant magnetostriction and the microstructure in Fe-Ga melt-spun ribbons
summary: Magnetoelastic anisotropy and <100> texture are crucial for promoting magnetostriction in Galfenol (Fe-Ga). Given that single-crystal Fe-Ga remains technically demanding and low magnetostriction of polycrystal, we explore melt-spun as an alternative, where rare-earth (RE) doping and cooling rates optimizing enable controllable <100> textured with required magnetoelastic anisotropy. Fe81Ga19 binary ribbons and RE-doped ribbons (0.2 at.% Pr, 1 at.% Pr and 1 at.% Ce) were fabricated at various cooling rates. Microstructural analyses reveal that RE elements preferentially dissolve into the matrix, while second-phase formation is suppressed at higher cooling rates. RE substitution increases the magnetostriction by enhancing magnetocrystalline distortion energy, while cooling rates act as an effective tuning knob to maximize the <100> texture. Notably, the decreased melting temperature associated with 1 at.% RE doping shifts the optimum texture to lower cooling rate compared with the binary alloy and 0.2 at.% RE doping sample. The magnetostriction as high as 688 ppm is achieved for the 1 at.% Ce doped ribbon fabricated at the speed of 1000 rotation per minute. These results demonstrate that RE-doped melt-spun ribbons are promising candidates for giant magnetostriction and establish a practical processing-texture-property guideline for designing highly magnetostrictive alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了稀土掺杂和冷却速率对熔纺Fe-Ga合金薄带<100>织构和磁致伸缩性能的影响，发现1 at.% Ce掺杂且在1000 rpm转速下制备的薄带磁致伸缩高达688 ppm，为开发大磁致伸缩合金提供了工艺-织构-性能的实用指导。
