AI.motivation: 单晶Fe-Ga制备难度大，多晶磁致伸缩低，因此探索熔纺工艺作为替代方案，通过稀土掺杂和冷却速率优化来获得可控的<100>织构和所需的磁弹各向异性。
AI.method: 制备了不同冷却速率下的Fe81Ga19二元薄带及掺杂0.2 at.% Pr、1 at.% Pr和1 at.% Ce的稀土掺杂薄带，通过微观结构分析研究稀土元素溶解行为、织构演变及磁致伸缩性能。
AI.result: 稀土元素优先溶入基体，较高冷却速率抑制第二相形成；稀土通过增强磁晶畸变能提高磁致伸缩，冷却速率有效调控<100>织构；1 at.%稀土掺杂降低熔点，使最佳织构向更低冷却速率偏移；1 at.% Ce掺杂薄带在1000 rpm下获得688 ppm的高磁致伸缩。
AI.conclusion: 稀土掺杂熔纺薄带是大磁致伸缩合金的有前景候选材料，研究建立了设计高磁致伸缩合金的实用工艺-织构-性能指导准则。

title: Evidence of a Hybridized Topological State in Weyl Semimetal/Topological Insulator Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$/Bi$_{0.85}$Sb$_{0.15}$ Heterostructures
summary: We report magnetotransport evidence of a hybridized Weyl semimetal (WSM) Fermi arc/topological insulator (TI) surface state at the interface of a ferromagnetic Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$/Bi$_{0.85}$Sb$_{0.15}$ heterostructure. High target utilization sputtering (HiTUS) was used to grow polycrystalline Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$ films and Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$/Bi$_{0.85}$Sb$_{0.15}$ heterostructures on thermally oxidized Si/SiO$_2$ (100) substrates that exhibit the negative coefficient anomalous Hall effect (AHE) resulting from topological Weyl node transport. When various defects and impurities are introduced into these Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$ films, a ferromagnetic (FM) phase develops that practically eliminates the topological Weyl node conduction. These FM Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$ films exhibit large exchange bias effects below T=200 K that we attribute to the coexistence of a FM phase and the triangular antiferromagnetic (AFM) WSM phase. When Bi$_{0.85}$Sb$_{0.15}$ overlayers are grown on the FM Mn$_{3+x}$Sn$_{1-x}$, the magnetotransport signal of Weyl node topological transport is restored, an effect we do not observe when replacing the Bi$_{0.85}$Sb$_{0.15}$ TI with heavy metal overlayers. We attribute the restoration of the Weyl node topological transport to the formation of a hybridized topological state at the WSM/TI interface.

AI.tldr: 本文报道在铁磁Mn₃₊ₓSn₁₋ₓ/Bi₀.₈₅Sb₀.₁₅异质结界面发现杂化的Weyl半金属/拓扑绝缘体表面态，通过HiTUS技术生长多晶薄膜，观察到Weyl节点拓扑输运在引入缺陷后被抑制，但通过覆盖Bi₀.₈₅Sb₀.₁₅拓扑绝缘体层得以恢复，归因于界面杂化拓扑态的形成。
AI.motivation: 探索Weyl半金属与拓扑绝缘体界面是否存在杂化的拓扑表面态，并研究其输运特性及恢复机制。
AI.method: 使用HiTUS生长多晶Mn₃₊ₓSn₁₋ₓ薄膜及Mn₃₊ₓSn₁₋ₓ/Bi₀.₈₅Sb₀.₁₅异质结，通过磁输运测量表征反常霍尔效应和交换偏置效应，对比不同覆盖层（TI vs 重金属）的影响。
AI.result: 缺陷和杂质诱导铁磁相，抑制Weyl节点拓扑输运；铁磁Mn₃₊ₓSn₁₋ₓ在T<200 K时呈现大交换偏置效应；覆盖Bi₀.₈₅Sb₀.₁₅ TI层后拓扑输运信号恢复，而重金属覆盖层无此效果。
AI.conclusion: WSM/TI界面形成了杂化的拓扑态，使得原本被铁磁相抑制的Weyl节点拓扑输运得以恢复，为设计新型拓扑电子器件提供了可能。

title: Phase-dependent electronic structure of two-dimensional Ag layers at the graphene/SiC interface
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, Supplementary information is in the ancillary file
summary: Intercalation at the graphene/SiC interface provides a controlled route to stabilize atomically thin layers with properties distinct from their bulk counterparts. In this platform, the structure and stability of the intercalated phase depend sensitively on the defect landscape of the starting substrate. For intercalated two-dimensional silver at the graphene/SiC interface, two phases have been observed: a phase epitaxial to the SiC lattice, Ag$_{(1)}$, readily obtained following the conventional intercalation method under ultra-high-vacuum conditions and extensively characterized, and a more densely packed phase, called Ag$_{(2)}$, which has remained largely unexplored. Here we report an in situ ultra-high-vacuum preparation method of the second phase intercalated at the graphene/SiC interface; this phase previously was prepared via high-pressure confinement heteroepitaxy. Low-energy electron diffraction shows that Ag$_{(2)}$ is rotated by 30 degree relative to the SiC lattice and forms supercells, in contrast to the $(1\times 1)$ epitaxial relation of Ag$_{(1)}$ with SiC. High-resolution angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy reveals a more rich Ag$_{(2)}$ band dispersion compared to the Ag$_{(1)}$. In density functional theory calculations, by defining the unfolding entropy which, in a quantified way, finds that the band structure of Ag$_{(2)}$ is more suitable to be unfolded to the SiC primitive cell, and the resulting unfolded band dispersion is in great agreement with the experimental data. We further show that the different intercalated Ag phases tune the electronic properties of the overlying quasi-free-standing graphene layer differently: compared with Ag$_{(1)}$, Ag$_{(2)}$ yields an $\sim$1.75 times higher charge carrier density and modifies the charge-plasmon interaction of the graphene layer, indicating a change in effective screening at the interface.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在石墨烯/SiC界面插层银的第二相(Ag₂)的制备方法、结构表征及其对石墨烯电子性质的影响。Ag₂相相对于SiC旋转30°并形成超晶胞，相比Ag₁相具有更丰富的能带结构，且能使上覆石墨烯的载流子密度提高约1.75倍，并改变电荷-等离子体相互作用。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯/SiC界面的插层技术可以制备性质独特的原子薄层材料。此前Ag₁相已被充分研究，而更致密的Ag₂相（之前仅通过高压限域异质外延制备）尚未被充分探索。作者希望在超高压条件下原位制备Ag₂相，并系统研究其结构、能带性质及对石墨烯电子性质的调控作用。
AI.method: 采用原位超高真空制备方法获得Ag₂插层相；使用低能电子衍射(LEED)表征结构；高分辨角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)测量能带结构；密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，并通过定义"展开熵"量化评价能带展开的适用性。
AI.result: Ag₂相相对于SiC晶格旋转30°并形成超晶胞，不同于Ag₁相的(1×1)外延关系；Ag₂相具有更丰富的能带色散；通过展开熵量化证明Ag₂能带更适合展开至SiC原胞；Ag₂相比Ag₁相使石墨烯载流子密度提高约1.75倍，并改变电荷-等离子体相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了Ag₂插层相的原位超高真空制备，揭示了其与Ag₁相显著不同的结构和电子性质，并证明不同银插层相可以有效调控上覆石墨烯的电子特性，为界面工程调控二维材料性质提供了新途径。

title: Photoluminescent Tetragonal Tb-doped Pb2P2O7
summary: In this study, we report the synthesis and characterization of a novel tetragonal polymorph of Tb-doped Pb2P2O7. Single-crystal X-ray diffraction confirms the stabilization of the P41 and P43 enantiomorphs at room temperature due to the incorporation of Tb3+ ions. Optical investigations reveal green photoluminescence from the characteristic 5D4 -> 7Fj (J = 1-5) transitions of Tb3+, with each emission split due to the crystal field effect, indicating the presence of Tb3+ in multiple coordination environments. The power dependence of the PL intensity follows a linear power-law behavior, suggesting a one-photon excitation process. Temperature-dependent PL measurements show an initial increase in intensity up to 125C, attributed to energy transfer from structural defects, followed by thermal quenching above this temperature. Structural stability at elevated temperatures is confirmed via high-temperature X-ray diffraction (XRD), showing no phase transitions before melting at approximately 800C. These findings highlight the potential of tetragonal Tb-doped Pb2P2O7 as a new class of photoluminescent material.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新型四方晶相Tb掺杂Pb2P2O7的合成与表征，该材料在室温下稳定存在，呈现绿色光致发光，在125°C以下强度随温度升高而增加，最终在约800°C熔化，展示了作为新型光致发光材料的潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索新型四方晶相Tb掺杂Pb2P2O7的合成可能性，并研究其作为光致发光材料的光学性能和热稳定性。
AI.method: 通过单晶X射线衍射确认晶体结构，利用光致发光光谱研究光学性质，采用变温PL测量和高温XRD分析热稳定性。
AI.result: 成功合成了P41和P43对映体；观察到Tb3+的5D4→7Fj特征绿色发光，且晶体场效应导致能级分裂；PL强度与激发功率呈线性关系（单光子过程）；PL强度在125°C以下上升（结构缺陷能量传递），之后热淬灭；材料在约800°C熔化前无相变。
AI.conclusion: 四方晶相Tb掺杂Pb2P2O7是一种具有良好热稳定性和独特发光特性的新型光致发光材料，具有潜在应用价值。

title: Selective Fermi-Level Pinning: A Design Strategy for Giant Rectification in Molecular Junctions
summary: Molecular rectifiers are key functional components of molecular-scale integrated circuits, yet achieving high rectification ratios remains a longstanding challenge due to the intrinsic symmetry of resonant tunneling and the complexity of interfacial energy-level alignment. Here, we propose a rectifier design strategy based on selective Fermi-level pinning that breaks transport symmetry via pinning interactions between molecular frontier orbitals and electrodes. This framework enforces tunneling transport to be predominantly governed by unoccupied molecular orbitals, while substantially suppressing contributions from occupied states, thereby establishing a simplified and highly controllable rectification mechanism. The resulting cyclo[n]carbon-based molecular junctions exhibit giant rectification ratios exceeding 103, while retaining exceptional structural robustness against variations in both donor chain length and carbon ring size. This work reveals the critical role of selective Fermi-level pinning in molecular junctions and provides a general design principle for engineering functional single-molecule electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于选择性费米能级钉扎的分子整流器设计策略，通过在环[n]碳分子结中实现超过10³的巨大整流比，并保持结构鲁棒性，突破了共振隧穿对称性限制。
AI.motivation: 分子整流器是分子集成电路的关键功能元件，但由于共振隧穿的内在对称性和界面能级对齐的复杂性，实现高整流比一直是长期挑战。
AI.method: 提出选择性费米能级钉扎策略，利用分子前线轨道与电极间的钉扎相互作用打破传输对称性，使隧穿输运主要由未占据分子轨道主导，同时抑制占据态的贡献，建立简化的整流机制。
AI.result: 基于环[n]碳的分子结实现了超过10³的巨整流比，同时对供体链长和碳环尺寸的变化保持优异的结构鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了选择性费米能级钉扎在分子结中的关键作用，为工程化功能型单分子电子器件提供了通用设计原则。

title: Localized Excitonic Emission in Wafer-Scale MOCVD-Grown GaSe 2D Nanosheets for Classical and Non-Classical Light Sources
summary: Wafer-scale growth of two-dimensional semiconductors remains a key challenge for their integration into photonic technologies. While most studies of two-dimensional semiconductors have focused on transition metal dichalcogenides and their scalable fabrication, comparatively little attention has been given to III-VI monochalcogenides. Here, we report wafer-scale growth of gallium selenide (GaSe) by metal-organic chemical vapor deposition (MOCVD) and investigate its structural and optical properties for visible-range classical and quantum light emission. Two samples with thicknesses ranging from a few monolayers to several micrometers, controlled via the growth time, were investigated. The 30-minute grown sample yields intense, broad photoluminescence spanning 1.7--2.0$\,$eV, whereas the thinner 3-minute sample exhibits discrete narrow emission lines and single-photon emission with $(g^{(2)}(0) = 0.15 \pm 0.10)$. Remarkably, cathodoluminescence mapping reveals pronounced spatial localization of both spectrally narrow and broad emission centers. Together with temperature-dependent power-law analysis and Raman mapping, our results indicate defect-induced emission rather than intrinsic excitonic recombination. These findings establish wafer-scale MOCVD grown 2D GaSe as a platform for classical and non-classical light sources and highlight defect-engineered localization as a route toward scalable quantum photonics.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过MOCVD实现晶圆级GaSe的生长，发现其光致发光特性（宽带和单光子发射）源于缺陷诱导而非本征激子复合，为可扩展量子光子学提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 晶圆级二维半导体的生长是将其集成到光子技术中的关键挑战，而III-VI族单硫族化物（如GaSe）相比过渡金属硫族化物受到的关注较少，亟需系统研究其可扩展制备与光发射特性。
AI.method: 采用MOCVD在晶圆尺度上生长GaSe，通过控制生长时间（3分钟和30分钟）调控厚度，利用光致发光（PL）、阴极发光（CL）映射、拉曼映射和温度依赖的幂律分析等手段表征其结构及光学性质。
AI.result: 30分钟生长样品产生覆盖1.7-2.0 eV的宽谱PL；3分钟样品则观察到离散窄线发射和单光子发射（g²(0)=0.15±0.10）。CL映射显示发射中心具有显著的空间局域化，结合温度依赖分析和拉曼映射，表明发射源于缺陷而非本征激子。
AI.conclusion: 晶圆级MOCVD生长的二维GaSe可作为经典和非经典光源的平台，缺陷工程实现的空间局域化为可扩展量子光子学提供了一条可行途径。

title: Disorder-Induced Phase Transitions in Altermagnetic Josephson Junctions
summary: Altermagnetic Josephson junctions (AMJJs) can host unconventional $π$ phase and $\varphi$ phase despite vanishing net magnetizations. Whether these phases are stable against disorder existing in real materials remains an open question. Here, we investigate impact of disorder on exotic phases in two-dimensional d-wave AMJJs. We show that disorder is able to induce phase transitions between the exotic $π$ and conventional 0 phases, accompanied by a strong suppression of critical current. This behavior is attributed to modifications of the tunneling Cooper-pair phase shift and superconducting decoherence. Remarkably, the anomalous $\varphi$ phase is highly fragile in presence of disorder and can be driven to either a $π$ phase or 0 phase in a nonreciprocal manner. Across such transitions, the first harmonic of current-phase relation changes sign, while the higher-order harmonics are rapidly suppressed. Our findings reveal the crucial role of disorder in tailoring distinct phases of AMJJs and shed new light on their potential functionalities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非磁性约瑟夫森结（AMJJs）中无序效应对非常规π相和φ相的影响，发现无序可诱导相变并抑制超流，其中φ相极其脆弱且以非互易方式转变为0相或π相。
AI.motivation: 尽管AMJJs在净磁化消失的情况下能产生非常规的π相和φ相，但这些相在真实材料中是否对无序保持稳定仍是一个未解问题，因此作者旨在探究无序对二维d波AMJJs中这些新奇相位的影响。
AI.method: 作者研究了二维d波AMJJs中无序对超导约瑟夫森结的影响，通过分析隧穿库珀对相位移动和超导退相干效应，观察了无序如何诱导0相、π相和φ相之间的相变。
AI.result: 无序可诱导π相与0相之间的相变，并显著抑制临界电流；异常φ相在无序下极为脆弱，能以非互易方式转变为π相或0相；跨相变时电流-相位关系的第一谐波改变符号，高次谐波被迅速抑制。
AI.conclusion: 无序在调控AMJJs的非常规相位中扮演关键角色，这一发现为未来AMJJs器件的功能化设计提供了新见解。
